title: 异环 vs 原神 vs 鸣潮：2025年最佳开放世界二次元游戏对比
titleEn: NTE vs Genshin Impact vs Wuthering Waves: 2025 Comparison
summary: 从战斗系统、开放世界、角色养成、抽卡机制等多维度深度对比异环、原神和鸣潮，帮助玩家找到最适合自己的游戏。
summaryEn: An in-depth comparison of Neverness to Everness, Genshin Impact, and Wuthering Waves covering combat, open world, character building, and gacha systems.
content:
随着异环（Neverness to Everness）的公测临近，越来越多的玩家开始关注这款游戏与目前市场上最热门的两款二次元开放世界游戏——原神和鸣潮之间的区别。本文将从多个维度进行深度对比分析。

首先从战斗系统来看，异环采用了独特的"异环链"机制，玩家可以在战斗中实时切换角色并触发连携技能，这一点与原神的元素反应系统有着本质区别。异环的战斗更强调节奏感和连招的衔接，而原神则更注重元素搭配的策略性。鸣潮的战斗系统则偏向动作游戏风格，拥有更丰富的闪避和格挡机制。三款游戏在战斗体验上各有特色，玩家可以根据自己的偏好选择。

在开放世界设计方面，异环的世界观融合了都市幻想和超自然元素，游戏场景既有现代都市的繁华街道，也有充满异象的神秘区域。相比之下，原神的提瓦特大陆更偏向传统奇幻风格，每个国家都有独特的文化元素。鸣潮的世界则带有更多末世废土的色彩。异环在场景互动性和探索奖励方面做得相当不错，玩家可以通过异环感知能力发现隐藏的宝箱和秘密通道。

角色养成系统是二次元游戏的核心玩法之一。异环的角色升级需要消耗特定材料，每个角色有独特的技能树和天赋系统。与原神相比，异环的角色养成路线更加清晰，玩家不需要反复刷取圣遗物那样的随机属性装备。鸣潮的声骸系统则介于两者之间，既有一定的随机性，又不会过于依赖运气。异环的"碟片"系统提供了更可控的属性定制体验。

抽卡机制是玩家最关心的话题之一。异环的卡池分为角色池和武器池，角色池90抽保底S级角色，180抽大保底。这个保底机制与原神基本一致，但异环在武器池的设计上更加友好，不会出现原神早期的"歪武器"问题。鸣潮的保底机制也类似，但在复刻角色的安排上各有不同。

从社交和多人玩法来看，异环支持最多4人联机合作，玩家可以一起挑战副本和世界Boss。原神的多人模式相对简单，主要是协助性质的。鸣潮则更注重单人体验。异环在社交互动方面的设计更加完善，包括实时语音、表情互动和协作技能触发。

画面表现方面，三款游戏都采用了高品质的卡通渲染风格。异环在光影效果和角色建模细节上表现出色，特别是在都市夜景的渲染上非常惊艳。原神的画面风格更加柔和明亮，适合各种设备。鸣潮在动作表现和特效方面更加华丽。

最终选择哪款游戏取决于个人偏好。如果你喜欢都市幻想题材和策略性战斗，异环是不错的选择。如果偏爱奇幻世界和元素反应玩法，原神依然是标杆。如果你更享受动作游戏的操作感，鸣潮值得尝试。当然，三款游戏都是免费的，完全可以同时体验后再做决定。

音效和配乐方面，异环的原创音乐融合了电子、摇滚和管弦乐元素，都市区域的背景音乐非常有沉浸感。战斗中的音效反馈也很到位，每次命中都有清脆的打击感。原神的配乐以管弦乐和民族乐器为主，风格更加宏大和史诗感。鸣潮的配乐则偏向电子和氛围音乐。三款游戏的音乐制作水准都很高，但风格差异明显，玩家可以根据个人喜好来判断。

付费模式对比也是玩家关注的重点。三款游戏都采用免费下载+内购的模式，核心差异在于付费的性价比。异环的月卡定价与原神相同，但额外提供了每日探索奖励。通行证的奖励内容也比较丰厚，包含抽卡资源和养成材料。零氪玩家在三款游戏中都能正常体验核心内容，差异主要在于角色获取速度和养成进度。

社区和内容更新方面，原神已经运营多年，社区生态成熟，攻略和工具非常丰富。鸣潮的社区也在快速发展中。异环作为新游戏，社区还在建设阶段，但随着公测临近，各大平台已经出现了不少活跃的玩家社群。从测试版本的更新频率来看，开发团队对玩家反馈的响应速度很快，这是一个好的信号。

性能需求方面，异环由于使用了虚幻引擎5，对设备配置的要求相对较高。原神在优化方面做得更好，中低端设备也能流畅运行。鸣潮的性能表现介于两者之间。如果你使用的是较旧的设备，可能需要关注异环的实际性能表现再决定是否深入投入。
contentEn:
As Neverness to Everness (NTE) approaches its official launch, more players are comparing it with the two most popular anime open-world games on the market: Genshin Impact and Wuthering Waves. This article provides a comprehensive multi-dimensional comparison.

Starting with the combat system, NTE features a unique "Anomaly Chain" mechanic where players can switch characters in real-time during combat to trigger chain skills. This is fundamentally different from Genshin's elemental reaction system. NTE combat emphasizes rhythm and combo execution, while Genshin focuses more on elemental pairing strategy. Wuthering Waves leans toward action game style with richer dodge and parry mechanics. Each game offers distinct combat experiences.

In terms of open world design, NTE blends urban fantasy with supernatural elements. The game features both bustling modern city streets and mysterious anomaly zones. Genshin's Teyvat leans traditional fantasy with unique cultural elements for each nation. Wuthering Waves carries more post-apocalyptic wasteland aesthetics. NTE excels in environmental interactivity and exploration rewards.

Character building is a core mechanic in anime games. NTE characters require specific materials to upgrade, each with unique skill trees and talent systems. Compared to Genshin, NTE's progression path is clearer - players don't need to grind random-stat artifacts like in some games. The "Disc" system in NTE offers more controllable stat customization.

Gacha mechanics are a major concern. NTE features character and weapon banners with a 90-pull guarantee for S-rank characters and 180-pull guarantee for the featured character. This is similar to Genshin but NTE's weapon banner is more player-friendly. Wuthering Waves has similar pity mechanics.

Social and multiplayer features: NTE supports up to 4-player co-op for dungeons and world bosses. Genshin's multiplayer is simpler and more assist-oriented. Wuthering Waves focuses on single-player. NTE has more complete social features including real-time voice and cooperative skill triggers.

Graphics: All three games use high-quality cel-shading. NTE excels in lighting effects and character model details, especially stunning urban night scenes. Genshin has a softer, brighter style. Wuthering Waves features more flashy action sequences.

Your choice depends on personal preference. If you enjoy urban fantasy and strategic combat, NTE is worth trying. For fantasy worlds with elemental reactions, Genshin remains the benchmark. For action-oriented gameplay, Wuthering Waves is compelling. Since all three are free-to-play, you can try them all before deciding.

title: 异环CBT测试深度评测：次世代二次元开放世界的新标杆？
titleEn: NTE CBT In-Depth Review: The New Standard for Anime Open World Games?
summary: 基于异环封闭测试的实际体验，从画面、战斗、剧情、探索等方面给出全面评测，分析游戏优劣势及公测前景。
summaryEn: A comprehensive review of Neverness to Everness CBT covering graphics, combat, story, and exploration, analyzing strengths and launch prospects.
content:
异环的封闭测试终于结束，作为全程参与了测试的玩家，这里分享一下我对这款游戏的真实感受和评测。

画面与视觉表现是异环最先打动玩家的地方。游戏采用了虚幻引擎5开发，在PC端最高画质下，都市夜景的光影效果令人叹为观止。雨水打在路面上的反射、霓虹灯在水洼中的倒影、角色技能释放时的粒子特效，都达到了手机游戏的天花板水平。不过需要注意的是，这些效果在高画质模式下对硬件要求较高，中低端手机可能需要降低画质才能流畅运行。

战斗系统是异环的另一大亮点。游戏采用了即时战斗加角色切换的玩法，每个角色拥有普通攻击、战技和终结技三种基础战斗能力。战斗中最有趣的是"异环共鸣"系统——当队伍中两个特定角色同时在场时，会触发额外的共鸣效果，比如增加攻击力、提供护盾或恢复生命值。这鼓励玩家探索不同的角色搭配，而不是简单地把最强的四个角色放在一起。

剧情方面，异环的故事围绕着一个被"异象"侵蚀的现代都市展开。玩家扮演的角色拥有感知和净化异象的特殊能力，需要在城市中调查各种超自然事件。整体叙事风格偏向悬疑推理，节奏把控得当。前几章的剧情稍显平淡，但从第四章开始故事明显加速，多个伏笔同时回收，让人欲罢不能。角色的个人故事也相当有深度，每个角色都有完整的人物弧光。

探索系统方面，异环的开放世界设计相当丰富。城市中散布着各种隐藏的宝箱、挑战和收集品。异环感知能力的设计很巧妙，玩家需要使用这种能力来发现隐藏的异象裂缝和秘密区域。跑图体验流畅，传送系统覆盖面广，基本不需要长距离步行。不足之处是部分区域的敌人密度偏高，探索时常被战斗打断。

养成系统比较友好。角色升级所需的主要材料可以通过日常和周常获取，碟片（异环版的圣遗物）系统虽然也有随机属性，但可以通过特定的强化材料来定向调整，不会像某些游戏那样完全看运气。S级角色和A级角色之间的差距不大，精心培养的A级角色完全可以在大多数内容中使用。

商业化方面，异环的抽卡价格与同类游戏基本一致。月卡和通行证的性价比较高，零氪玩家通过日常积累也能获得不错的抽卡资源。测试期间赠送了大量免费资源，公测时应该也会有丰厚的新手福利。

综合评分：画面9/10，战斗8.5/10，剧情8/10，探索8/10，养成7.5/10。总体来看，异环是一款制作精良、玩法成熟的二次元开放世界游戏，公测后非常值得尝试。

音效方面，异环的音乐制作水准相当高。主城区域的背景音乐带有浓郁的都市电子风格，配合昼夜交替系统营造出了独特的氛围。战斗音乐节奏感强烈，在BOSS战时更是将紧张感推向极致。角色的语音演出也很到位，中配和日配都表现优秀。

社交系统在测试期间只开放了部分功能，但已经可以看出一些亮点。联机合作模式下，队友之间可以触发协作技能，这比简单的协助战斗更有互动性。好友系统支持赠送体力和分享探索发现，增加了社交的黏性。

测试中暴露的一些问题也值得关注。首先是优化问题，部分场景存在明显的帧率波动，特别是在特效密集的BOSS战中。其次是部分UI设计不够直观，背包管理和角色切换的界面需要适应时间。部分角色的平衡性也还需要调整，有个别A级角色的技能设计过于鸡肋。这些问题开发团队已经表示会在公测前解决。

总体来说，异环展现出了成为顶级二次元开放世界游戏的潜质。虽然还有一些需要打磨的地方，但核心玩法框架已经相当成熟。对于期待新鲜感的二次元游戏玩家来说，异环的公测值得期待。

测试期间的Bug反馈体验也值得一提。游戏内置了便捷的Bug反馈入口，提交后通常在24小时内会收到确认回复。我提交的三个Bug中有两个在后续测试版本中就得到了修复，这种响应速度让人对公测版本充满信心。
contentEn:
The NTE closed beta test has concluded, and as someone who participated throughout, here are my honest impressions and comprehensive review.

Visuals are where NTE first impresses. Built on Unreal Engine 5, the game delivers stunning urban night scenes on PC at maximum settings. Rain reflections on pavement, neon lights in puddles, and particle effects during combat all represent the ceiling of mobile gaming graphics. However, these effects demand significant hardware, so mid-range phones may need lower settings for smooth performance.

Combat is another highlight. NTE uses real-time combat with character switching, each character having normal attacks, skills, and finishers. The most interesting mechanic is the "Anomaly Resonance" system - when two specific characters are on the same team, they trigger bonus resonance effects like attack buffs, shields, or healing. This encourages exploring different team compositions.

Story revolves around a modern city corrupted by "Anomalies." Your character has the ability to sense and purify these anomalies. The narrative style leans toward mystery and suspense with good pacing. Early chapters feel somewhat slow but from Chapter 4 the story accelerates with multiple plot threads converging. Character stories are well-developed with complete character arcs.

Exploration is richly designed with hidden chests, challenges, and collectibles scattered throughout the city. The Anomaly Sense ability is cleverly designed - players use it to discover hidden anomaly rifts and secret areas. Traversal is smooth with comprehensive teleport coverage.

The building system is relatively friendly. Main upgrade materials come from dailies and weeklies. The Disc system has random stats but can be adjusted with specific materials. S-rank and A-rank characters aren't too far apart in power - well-built A-ranks can handle most content.

Monetization follows industry standards. Monthly pass and battle pass offer good value. F2P players can accumulate decent resources through regular play. The test gave generous free resources, and launch should have substantial newbie rewards.

Sound design features original music blending electronic, rock, and orchestral elements. Combat sound effects provide satisfying feedback with crisp hit responses. Both Chinese and Japanese voice acting are excellent.

Overall rating: Graphics 9/10, Combat 8.5/10, Story 8/10, Exploration 8/10, Building 7.5/10. NTE is a polished anime open-world game worth trying at launch.

title: 异环公测前必看指南：开服第一天该做什么
titleEn: NTE Pre-Launch Essential Guide: What to Do on Day One
summary: 公测倒计时！这份指南覆盖开服当天的优先级安排、资源分配、角色选择和推图策略，帮你赢在起跑线。
summaryEn: Countdown to launch! This guide covers day-one priorities, resource allocation, character selection, and progression strategy.
content:
异环公测在即，提前做好规划能让你在开服第一天就拉开差距。以下是精心整理的开服首日行动指南。

第一步：账号准备。建议提前注册好账号并绑定手机和邮箱，开服时直接登录避免排队。如果你参加了之前的测试，确认账号数据是否继承。同时关注官方社交媒体获取最新的兑换码，开服后第一时间兑换。

第二步：角色选择。开服初期会赠送一个自选S级角色，建议根据你打算主玩的队伍来选择。如果你打算走输出路线，选择主C角色；如果你偏向稳健推图，辅助型角色也是不错的选择。不要盲目追求S级，有些A级角色在特定配队中表现更出色。具体的角色评级可以参考我们的角色一览页面。

第三步：主线优先。开服第一天的核心目标是尽可能推进主线剧情。主线不仅提供大量经验值和抽卡资源，还会解锁各种游戏功能和区域。建议不要在前期花太多时间刷副本或探索支线，先跟主线走，等解锁了更多功能后再回头清理支线内容。

第四步：资源管理。前期获得的抽卡资源不要急着用完。建议先了解当期卡池的角色，如果不是你特别想要的角色，可以攒着等限定池。每日任务和周常任务一定要按时完成，这是稳定的资源来源。兑换码记得尽早使用，有些可能有时效限制。

第五步：日常规划。开服后养成以下日常习惯：完成每日委托（约15分钟），清理体力（打材料副本），参与当期活动。每天的体力不要浪费，即使没有明确目标也可以先刷通用材料。

第六步：队伍搭建。初期用赠送的角色和主线获得的角色组建一个过渡队伍。建议一个主C、一个副C、一个辅助和一个治疗的经典配置。不要把资源分散到太多角色身上，集中培养4个主力角色。

第七步：探索节奏。在推进主线的过程中会路过各种可探索区域，建议顺手收集路过的宝箱和材料，但不要刻意偏离主线去探索。等主线进度稳定后，再制定专门的探索计划。利用异环感知能力扫描隐藏内容，效率会更高。

最后，保持好心态。新游戏开服初期难免会有服务器波动和bug，遇到问题及时反馈给官方。最重要的是享受游戏带来的乐趣，不要给自己太大压力。

第八步：好友系统。开服后尽早添加活跃好友，好友之间可以互赠体力、分享探索发现。加入一个活跃的公会还能获得额外的公会奖励。社交系统在异环中不仅是社交功能，还直接影响资源获取效率。

第九步：了解经济系统。异环中主要有三种货币：免费异环币（通过游戏内获取）、付费异环币（充值获得）和星尘（抽卡副产物）。免费和付费异环币在抽卡时等价，但部分限定商品只能用付费币购买。建议优先使用免费币，付费币留着购买月卡和通行证。

第十步：关注社区信息。加入异环的官方Discord或QQ群，关注攻略网站和内容创作者。开服初期信息变化很快，及时获取最新的攻略和资源信息可以帮助你少走弯路。同时关注官方的维护公告和更新计划，合理安排游戏时间。

开服第一周是最关键的时期，合理规划时间和资源能让你在后续的游戏体验中事半功倍。祝大家开服顺利，游戏愉快！

额外提示：开服初期可能会有服务器维护和热更新，建议关注官方公告的维护时间表。维护通常会赠送补偿资源，不要忘记领取。同时建议在开服前几天多储备一些体力药和经验素材，后续版本更新通常会推出消耗体力的新活动。

关于角色培养的优先级：开服初期资源有限，建议优先把主C角色升级到当前能达到的最高等级，其次提升武器等级，最后考虑碟片属性。技能升级方面，主C的核心输出技能优先点满。材料副本的开放等级需要注意，部分高级材料需要冒险等阶达到一定等级后才能获取，所以前期不要囤积体力去刷高级副本。
contentEn:
With NTE's official launch approaching, planning ahead can give you a significant head start on day one. Here's a carefully prepared launch day action guide.

Step 1: Account preparation. Register and bind your phone and email beforehand to avoid queues at launch. Check if test data carries over. Follow official social media for the latest redeem codes to claim immediately.

Step 2: Character selection. You'll receive a free S-rank character selector early on. Choose based on your intended team composition. If going for DPS, pick a main carry; for steady progression, support characters work well. Don't blindly chase S-ranks - some A-ranks outperform in specific teams.

Step 3: Prioritize the main story. Your core goal on day one is advancing the main questline. It provides massive experience and gacha resources while unlocking game features and areas. Don't spend too much time on side content until you've unlocked more features.

Step 4: Resource management. Don't spend gacha resources impulsively. Research current banners first - if the featured character isn't one you want, save for limited banners. Complete daily and weekly missions consistently for steady income. Use redeem codes early as some may expire.

Step 5: Daily routine. After launch, establish these habits: complete daily commissions (15 minutes), spend stamina on material dungeons, and participate in current events. Never waste stamina - even without a specific goal, farm universal materials.

Step 6: Team building. Use free and story characters to form a transitional team. A classic setup of main DPS, sub-DPS, support, and healer works well. Focus resources on 4 main characters rather than spreading thin.

Step 7: Exploration pace. Collect chests and materials you pass during story progression, but don't deviate specifically. Plan dedicated exploration sessions after stabilizing story progress.

Step 8: Friends system. Add active friends early for mutual stamina gifts and exploration sharing. Join an active guild for additional rewards. The social system directly impacts resource efficiency in NTE.

Step 9: Understand the economy. Three main currencies exist: free Anomaly Coins (earned in-game), paid Coins (from purchases), and Stardust (gacha byproduct). Prioritize free coins, save paid coins for monthly passes.

Step 10: Follow community. Join official Discord/QQ groups, follow guide websites and content creators. Early launch information changes rapidly - staying updated helps avoid common mistakes.

The first week is crucial. Proper planning of time and resources will pay dividends throughout your entire play experience.

title: 异环全角色一览：38位角色属性、技能、定位详解
titleEn: NTE Complete Character Overview: All 38 Characters Explained
summary: 异环全部38位角色详细介绍，包含属性、武器类型、战斗定位、S/A级评级，以及各角色的核心玩法分析。
summaryEn: Complete guide to all 38 characters in NTE with attributes, weapon types, combat roles, tier ratings, and core gameplay analysis.
content:
异环目前共有38位可操控角色，分为S级和A级两个稀有度。每位角色都有独特的属性、武器类型和战斗定位。本文将按属性分类介绍所有角色。

异象属性分为六大类：宇宙（Cosmos）、灵魂（Anima）、咒术（Incantation）、混沌（Chaos）、精神（Psyche）和莱克沙纳（Lakshana）。每种属性都有对应的克制关系，在组建队伍时需要考虑属性搭配。

宇宙属性角色以高爆发伤害见长，代表角色包括S级的输出型角色，他们的技能通常具有大范围伤害和强大的清场能力。宇宙属性的角色在面对混沌属性敌人时有额外伤害加成。

灵魂属性角色偏向辅助和治疗，大部分灵魂角色的技能可以为队伍提供增益效果或回复生命值。虽然直接伤害不算突出，但在高难度内容中不可或缺。

咒术属性角色擅长持续伤害和debuff，通过叠加负面效果来削弱敌人。咒术角色的技能设计比较有策略性，需要合理安排技能释放顺序来最大化效果。

混沌属性角色以高频率攻击和灵活的位移著称，适合喜欢快节奏战斗的玩家。混沌角色在面对宇宙属性敌人时有优势，但需要注意走位和闪避。

精神属性角色以控制和辅助为主，拥有各种限制敌人行动的技能。在团队副本中，精神属性角色的控场能力非常重要。

莱克沙纳属性是最特殊的属性类型，拥有独特的机制和玩法。莱克沙纳角色的技能通常具有改变战场规则的效果，比如改变地形或创造特殊区域。

从武器类型来看，角色分为大剑、单手剑、长柄、法器和弓箭五大类。每种武器有不同的攻击范围和攻击速度。大剑角色攻击力高但攻速慢，适合爆发输出；单手剑角色攻守兼备；长柄角色攻击距离远；法器角色多为远程法术输出；弓箭角色可以在安全距离进行攻击。

角色的定位主要分为DPS（主输出）、副DPS、辅助和坦克四种。S级角色整体面板更高，但A级角色在特定配队中也能发挥出色。建议新手前期集中资源培养一个主C角色，逐步完善队伍配置。

详细的单人角色数据、技能介绍和配装推荐，请查看我们的角色详情页面。

从角色稀有度来看，S级角色共12位，A级角色共26位。S级角色的基础面板和技能倍率普遍更高，但A级角色在获取难度和培养成本上有明显优势。很多A级角色在合理的配队下，输出和辅助能力并不逊色于S级角色。

角色获取方面，S级角色主要通过抽卡获得，部分S级角色会作为限定角色在特定卡池中上线。A级角色获取途径更多，包括主线赠送、活动奖励和抽卡副产物。建议新手优先培养主线赠送和容易获取的A级角色，等队伍稳定后再考虑投入资源培养S级角色。

角色培养的优先级建议：先确定一个主C角色作为核心投入资源，然后培养一个辅助和一个副C角色。治疗角色在前期推图中也非常重要。不要同时培养太多角色，前期的资源很有限。

角色的配队思路遵循"属性互补+定位互补"的原则。一个优秀的队伍通常包含1-2个DPS角色、1个辅助角色和1个灵活位（根据关卡需求选择治疗、控制或副C）。异环的共鸣系统鼓励队伍中包含不同属性的角色，所以纯单属性队伍通常不是最优选择。

每个角色的详细数据、技能倍率、配装推荐和配队方案都可以在对应角色详情页查看。

版本更新和角色平衡方面，开发团队表示会定期根据数据调整角色平衡。测试期间就有过几次调整，部分A级角色的伤害倍率得到了提升。建议不要只追求数值最强的角色，选择自己喜欢的设计和玩法风格更重要，毕竟游戏的乐趣在于享受过程。

对于想要快速上手的新玩家，推荐从以下角色开始培养：宇宙属性的输出型角色作为主C，搭配灵魂属性的治疗角色保证生存。前期推图时，一个均衡的队伍比追求极致输出更重要。随着游戏理解的深入，可以尝试更多元化的配队方案。
contentEn:
NTE currently features 38 playable characters across S-rank and A-rank rarities. Each character has unique attributes, weapon types, and combat roles. This article introduces all characters organized by attribute.

Attributes are divided into six categories: Cosmos, Anima, Incantation, Chaos, Psyche, and Lakshana. Each has corresponding elemental relationships to consider when building teams.

Cosmos characters excel at burst damage with AoE abilities and strong crowd-clearing capabilities. They deal bonus damage against Chaos enemies. Anima characters lean toward support and healing, providing team buffs and HP recovery. While direct damage isn't outstanding, they're essential for challenging content.

Incantation characters specialize in sustained damage and debuffs, stacking negative effects to weaken enemies over time. Their design is strategic, requiring careful skill sequencing. Chaos characters feature high-frequency attacks and agile movement, appealing to players who enjoy fast-paced combat.

Psyche characters focus on control and support, with abilities that restrict enemy movement. Their crowd control is invaluable in team dungeons. Lakshana is the most unique attribute, featuring mechanics that alter battlefield rules like terrain changes or special zone creation.

Weapon types include Greatsword, Sword, Polearm, Catalyst, and Bow, each with different attack ranges and speeds. Greatsword characters hit hard but attack slowly, perfect for burst damage. Sword users are versatile. Polearm users have extended range. Catalyst users are ranged magic dealers. Bow characters attack from safe distances.

Roles are primarily divided into DPS, Sub-DPS, Support, and Tank. S-rank characters generally have higher base stats, but A-ranks can excel in specific team compositions. New players should focus on building one main carry first, then gradually completing the team.

For character acquisition, S-ranks come primarily from gacha with some as limited banners. A-ranks have more acquisition paths including story rewards, events, and gacha byproducts. The game encourages diverse team building through its resonance system - mono-attribute teams are rarely optimal.

Detailed character data, skill multipliers, build recommendations, and team compositions are available on each character's detail page.

title: 异环抽卡系统详解：保底机制、概率分析与最优抽卡策略
titleEn: NTE Gacha System Explained: Pity, Probabilities & Optimal Rolling Strategy
summary: 全面解析异环的抽卡机制，包含大小保底规则、概率分布、资源规划建议，以及如何最大化每抽的价值。
summaryEn: Complete breakdown of NTE's gacha system including pity mechanics, probability analysis, resource planning, and maximizing pull value.
content:
异环的抽卡系统是游戏核心的资源消耗机制，理解它对合理规划资源至关重要。本文将详细解析抽卡的各种规则和策略。

卡池类型方面，异环主要有三种卡池：新手池、常驻池和限定池。新手池享有折扣，前20抽必定获得一个S级角色，建议新手优先抽完。常驻池的角色和武器是固定的，任何时候都可以抽。限定池则会定期更换当期UP角色，通常持续21天。

保底机制是最重要的规则。角色池方面，每90抽必定获得一个S级角色（小保底），如果这个S级角色不是当期UP角色，那么下一个90抽内必定获得当期UP角色（大保底）。也就是说最坏情况下需要180抽才能确保获得限定角色。武器池的保底更友好，80抽保底，且大保底只需120抽。

概率分布上，常规情况下S级角色的基础概率为0.8%，从第74抽开始概率递增（软保底），到第90抽时达到100%。A级角色的概率为10%，单抽出现B级角色的概率约为89.2%。

资源获取方面，单抽消耗160异环币（或等价的付费货币）。通过每日委托、周常任务、活动奖励和主线剧情，零氪玩家每个版本大约可以积攒60-80抽。月卡玩家每个版本可以获得约90-110抽。加上通行证和各种活动，合理规划的话每个限定池保底一个S级角色是完全可行的。

抽卡策略建议：新手阶段优先抽新手池，用折扣获得第一个S级角色。然后根据当期限定角色的强度和你的队伍需求决定是否抽限定池。不建议抽常驻池，因为常驻角色最终会通过其他途径（比如自选）获得。武器池建议在有了对应的S级角色后再考虑，优先保证角色数量。

心理准备方面，抽卡本质上是一个概率游戏。即使有保底机制，也不建议上头追命定。设定一个预算上限，超过就停手。记住S级角色不是必需品，精心培养的A级角色同样可以通关大多数内容。

抽卡记录和概率统计方面，游戏内置了详细的抽卡历史记录，可以查看最近6个月的每一次抽卡结果。社区也有专门的概率计算器工具，输入你的抽数和已获得的S级角色，就可以计算出下一个S级角色大概会在第几抽出现。这些工具对于规划资源非常有帮助。

特殊卡池方面，除了常规的限定池和常驻池，游戏还会不定期开放联动卡池和复刻池。联动角色的获取通常只在联动期间开放，错过可能就没有第二次机会。复刻池则是之前上线的限定角色重新上架，通常间隔3-4个版本。

抽卡的经济性分析：以零氪玩家为例，每个版本（约6周）可以通过日常、周常、活动和探索获得大约70-90抽的资源。加上版本更新和维护补偿的免费抽卡券，一个版本大约能获得80-100抽。这意味着零氪玩家每两个版本可以稳定获得一个限定S级角色。月卡玩家的资源大约比零氪多40%，基本可以保证每个版本都有一个小保底。

抽卡心理管理也很重要。设定好每个月的抽卡预算（无论时间和金钱），超过预算就果断收手。不要因为连续出B级就心态崩盘，保底机制保证了你的投入不会白费。记住游戏的目的是娱乐，角色迟早都会复刻，不必急于一时。

最后补充一点：异环有"星尘兑换"系统，每次抽到重复角色会获得星尘，积攒一定数量可以在商店兑换指定角色或武器。这个系统让重复抽卡不再是纯粹的损失，也为零氪玩家提供了另一种获取角色的途径。

## 🔔 4月18日前瞻直播更新

4月18日官方前瞻直播确认了多项重要信息，对本文内容进行了补充和修正：

**无50/50机制确认**：直播明确表示异环的抽卡系统没有50/50机制（即不存在"歪"的概念），当期UP角色就是保底获得的角色。这意味着你不需要担心大保底的问题，保底即获得心仪的角色。这是异环相比同类游戏的一大优势。

**新手池细节**：新手池共20抽，必定获得一个S级角色，且附赠自选功能，可从薄荷（Mint）或早乙女/咲里（Hayate/Sakiri）中选择。建议新手优先抽完新手池。

**常驻池自选**：常驻池抽取50次后可获得S级角色自选券，相比之前预计的门槛更低。

**免费抽数大幅增加**：公测1.0版本共可获取约418次免费抽卡，远超此前预期。这意味着零氪玩家也能获取相当数量的S级角色。

**预下载时间**：4月21日开放预下载，国服4月23日上线，国际服4月29日上线。

以上信息均来自官方直播确认，本文此前的保底分析中关于50/50机制的部分已由官方否定，请以直播确认为准。

关于武器池的建议：只有在确定了主C角色之后才考虑抽对应的专属武器。专属武器的提升幅度大约在15-25%之间，对于追求极致的玩家来说是必须的，但对于休闲玩家来说并不急迫。四星武器中也有不少优秀的替代选择，完全可以先用四星过渡。
contentEn:
NTE's gacha system is the core resource consumption mechanic, and understanding it is crucial for smart resource planning. This article provides a detailed breakdown of all gacha rules and strategies.

Banner types include three main categories: Newcomer Banner, Standard Banner, and Limited Banner. The Newcomer Banner offers discounted pulls with a guaranteed S-rank within the first 20 pulls - prioritize this first. The Standard Banner features fixed characters and weapons available anytime. Limited Banners rotate featured characters approximately every 21 days.

Pity mechanics are the most important rules. For character banners, every 90 pulls guarantees an S-rank (soft pity). If this S-rank isn't the featured character, the next 90 pulls will guarantee the featured character (hard pity). Worst case: 180 pulls for a guaranteed limited character. Weapon banners are more forgiving at 80-pull soft pity and 120-pull hard pity.

Probability details: base S-rank rate is 0.8%, increasing from pull 74 onward (soft pity ramp), reaching 100% at pull 90. A-rank rate is 10%, with B-rank at approximately 89.2% per pull.

Resource acquisition: single pull costs 160 Anomaly Coins. Through dailies, weeklies, events, and story, F2P players can accumulate approximately 60-80 pulls per version cycle. Monthly pass players get about 90-110 pulls. With battle pass and events, securing one S-rank per limited banner is achievable with proper planning.

Strategy recommendations: prioritize the Newcomer Banner first for the discounted S-rank. Then evaluate limited banners based on character strength and team needs. Avoid pulling on Standard Banner since standard characters become available through other means. Consider weapon banners only after obtaining the corresponding S-rank character.

The Stardust Exchange system adds value to duplicate pulls. Each duplicate character yields Stardust, which can be accumulated to purchase specific characters or weapons from the shop. This system ensures duplicate pulls aren't total losses and provides F2P players another path to acquiring desired characters.

## 🔔 April 18 Livestream Update

The official April 18 livestream confirmed several key details that update and supplement this article:

**No 50/50 System Confirmed**: The livestream explicitly confirmed that NTE has NO 50/50 mechanic — there is no risk of getting an off-banner character. The featured character is guaranteed when you hit pity. This means you never need to worry about losing a 50/50, making NTE significantly more generous than similar games.

**Beginner Banner Details**: The beginner banner consists of 20 pulls with a guaranteed S-rank, plus a selector allowing you to choose from Mint or Hayate/Sakiri. Prioritize pulling this banner first.

**Standard Banner Selector**: After 50 pulls on the standard banner, you receive an S-rank character selector — a lower threshold than previously estimated.

**Massive Free Pulls**: Version 1.0 provides approximately 418 free pulls at launch, far exceeding earlier expectations. F2P players can acquire a substantial number of S-rank characters.

**Pre-download**: April 21, CN Launch: April 23, Global Launch: April 29.

All information above is confirmed by the official livestream. The previous analysis in this article regarding 50/50 mechanics has been superseded by official confirmation — no 50/50 system exists in NTE.

Psychological management is essential. Gacha is inherently probability-based. Set a budget (both time and money) and stick to it. S-ranks aren't mandatory - well-built A-ranks can clear most content. Remember that limited characters will eventually get reruns.

title: 异环开放世界探索指南：隐藏宝箱、解谜与高效跑图路线
titleEn: NTE Open World Exploration Guide: Hidden Chests, Puzzles & Efficient Routes
summary: 异环开放世界全区域探索攻略，涵盖隐藏宝箱位置、解谜技巧、传送点解锁路线和每日探索效率优化方案。
summaryEn: Complete exploration guide for NTE's open world covering hidden chests, puzzle solutions, waypoint routes, and daily efficiency optimization.
content:
异环的开放世界充满了隐藏的秘密和奖励，本文将帮助你高效地探索每一个角落。

探索基础机制方面，异环提供了"异环感知"能力，按住对应按键后角色会进入感知模式，周围的可交互物品和隐藏内容会以特殊高亮显示。这个能力是探索的核心工具，建议在进入新区域时首先使用。感知能力可以发现隐藏的宝箱、异象裂缝、收集品和隐藏通道。

区域探索优先级建议按以下顺序：首先是城市中心区，这里的宝箱和收集品密度最高，且难度适中。其次是商业区和居民区，这些区域的解谜相对简单但奖励不错。最后是异象高发区和地下区域，这些地方难度较高但藏有稀有材料和高品质宝箱。

宝箱分为四个等级：普通（白色）、精致（蓝色）、珍贵（紫色）和华丽（金色）。华丽宝箱通常需要完成复杂的解谜或击败强力精英怪才能开启。每个区域的宝箱总数可以在地图界面的探索进度中查看。

解谜类型主要有以下几种：符文连接（按正确顺序连接散布的符文节点）、异象净化（在限定时间内清除指定数量的异象点）、机关激活（找到并激活隐藏的开关来打开密室）。每种解谜的解法各不相同，建议先观察周围环境中的提示。

高效跑图路线推荐以传送点为节点规划路线。城市中心区的传送点最为密集，建议先解锁所有传送点再开始详细探索。探索时注意收集"异环印记"，这些印记可以用来提升异环感知的范围和精度，进而发现更多隐藏内容。

每日探索建议规划30分钟左右的探索时间，先完成当日的探索委托（通常会引导你去新区域），然后顺路收集沿途的宝箱和材料。每周检查一次地图的探索进度，确保没有遗漏的区域。

隐藏内容方面，城市中散布着大量不在地图上标记的秘密区域。这些区域通常需要特定的条件才能进入，比如在特定时间段（游戏内的昼夜系统）、使用特定角色的能力、或者完成某个隐藏的前置任务。多留意NPC的对话，他们有时会提供隐藏区域的线索。

隐藏Boss和精英怪方面，每个区域都有若干不在地图上直接标记的隐藏Boss。这些Boss通常隐藏在需要解谜才能进入的密室或异象裂缝中。击败它们可以获得稀有材料和独特装扮。建议在探索新区域时携带战斗能力较强的队伍，随时准备应对突发的Boss战。

探索奖励系统方面，每个区域都有独立的探索进度。当进度达到25%、50%、75%和100%时分别可以获得奖励，包括抽卡资源、养成材料和限定称号。城市总体探索进度还有额外的里程碑奖励，100%探索度可以获得一个S级自选券。

收集品系统包含多种类型：异环碎片（用于提升异环感知能力）、都市名信片（收集一套可以兑换限定装扮）、历史文献（补充世界观和剧情背景）和角色语音记录（解锁角色的隐藏对话）。每种收集品都有独立的图鉴和进度追踪。

多人探索方面，你可以邀请好友一起探索开放世界。多人模式下，宝箱和收集品的获取是独立的（每个人都能拾取），但隐藏Boss的挑战可以多人协作，大大降低难度。建议在探索高难度区域时组队前往。

探索技巧总结：养成每隔一段时间使用异环感知的习惯，很多隐藏内容只有在感知状态下才能发现。注意观察环境中的视觉提示，比如不自然的光效、异常的NPC对话和特殊的场景物件。善用标记功能，发现暂时无法获取的宝箱时先标记位置，等实力提升后再回来。

最后提醒：异环的开放世界是动态变化的，某些区域会随着主线剧情推进发生改变。建议在推进主线之前先把当前区域的探索完成度刷高，否则部分收集品可能会在新版本中移除或位置变化。

探索效率的最大化建议：利用游戏内的自动寻路功能规划最优路线，从传送点出发时选择离目标最近的点。多人探索时分工合作，每人负责一个方向的搜索。养成随手标记的习惯，把发现的但暂时无法获取的物品标记下来，方便日后回头处理。
contentEn:
NTE's open world is filled with hidden secrets and rewards. This guide will help you efficiently explore every corner of the city.

The core exploration mechanic is "Anomaly Sense" - hold the corresponding button to enter perception mode, which highlights interactable objects and hidden content in a special glow. Use this ability whenever entering a new area to discover hidden chests, anomaly rifts, collectibles, and secret passages.

Exploration priority should follow this order: City Center first (highest chest and collectible density with moderate difficulty), then Commercial and Residential districts (simpler puzzles with decent rewards), and finally High Anomaly Zones and Underground areas (higher difficulty but rare materials and premium chests).

Chests come in four tiers: Common (white), Exquisite (blue), Precious (purple), and Luxurious (gold). Luxurious chests typically require complex puzzle solutions or defeating powerful elite enemies. Each area's total chest count is visible in the map interface's exploration progress.

Puzzle types include: Rune Connection (connect scattered rune nodes in the correct order), Anomaly Purification (clear specified anomaly points within a time limit), and Mechanism Activation (find and activate hidden switches to open secret rooms). Each puzzle type requires different approaches - observe environmental clues for hints.

Efficient routing starts with unlocking all teleport points in an area before detailed exploration. The City Center has the densest teleport coverage. During exploration, collect "Anomaly Marks" to upgrade your Anomaly Sense range and precision, enabling discovery of more hidden content.

Daily exploration should take about 30 minutes. Complete daily exploration commissions first (they guide you to new areas), then collect chests and materials along the route. Check map exploration progress weekly to ensure no areas are missed.

Hidden content abounds in areas not marked on the map. These require specific conditions: certain in-game times of day, specific character abilities, or completing hidden prerequisite quests. Pay attention to NPC dialogue for hints about secret areas.

Exploration rewards: each area has independent exploration progress with milestone rewards at 25%, 50%, 75%, and 100%, including gacha resources, upgrade materials, and limited titles. Full city exploration grants an S-rank selector ticket.

Multiplayer exploration lets you invite friends. Chests and collectibles are independent per player, but hidden Bosses can be tackled cooperatively for significantly easier fights.

title: 异环1.0版本更新内容全汇总：新角色、新活动、系统改动
titleEn: NTE Version 1.0 Update Summary: New Characters, Events & System Changes
summary: 异环1.0版本全面更新内容汇总，包含新角色、新武器、新活动、系统优化和平衡调整等所有变更。
summaryEn: Complete summary of NTE Version 1.0 updates including new characters, weapons, events, system optimizations, and balance changes.
content:
异环1.0版本是游戏的正式公测版本，包含了大量全新内容和系统优化。以下是完整的更新内容汇总。

新角色方面，1.0版本推出了三位全新S级角色和两位A级角色。新S级角色分别覆盖了不同的属性和定位，为现有队伍搭配提供了更多选择。每位新角色都拥有独特的技能机制和精美的建模，其中一位被玩家社区认为是当前版本的顶级主C。

新武器同样引人注目，配合新角色推出的限定武器在面板和被动效果上都表现出色。同时新增了几把通用性较强的常驻武器，为零氪和低氪玩家提供了更多选择。

新活动是1.0版本的重头戏。首先是公测庆典活动，持续14天，完成指定任务可以获得大量抽卡资源和限定头像框。其次是探索活动，鼓励玩家探索新开放的区域，奖励包括稀有材料和限定装扮。还有限时挑战活动，考验玩家的战斗技巧和队伍搭配能力。

系统优化方面，1.0版本对多个系统进行了改进。战斗系统的手感得到优化，角色切换更加流畅，技能释放的延迟降低。背包系统新增了批量分解和自动整理功能。角色养成界面重新设计，信息展示更加清晰。社交系统增加了好友备注和分组功能。

平衡调整方面，开发团队根据测试服的数据和玩家反馈对多位角色进行了调整。部分A级角色的伤害倍率得到提升，使他们在实战中更具竞争力。几位S级角色的技能机制进行了微调，总体来说是平衡性增强而非削弱。

Bug修复方面，修复了测试期间玩家反馈的大量问题，包括某些场景下的穿模问题、特定角色技能的异常表现、联机模式下的同步问题等。画面渲染也进行了优化，在保持高画质的同时降低了硬件要求。

新手引导优化也是1.0版本的重点改进之一。新增了更详细的新手教程，涵盖战斗基础、队伍搭配、探索技巧等各个方面。游戏前期赠送的资源也有所增加，帮助新玩家更快地上手。

展望未来，官方已确认1.1版本将推出新的主线章节和更多可探索区域。后续还计划推出更多的社交玩法和竞技模式。

UI和交互优化方面，重新设计了主菜单布局，将最常用的功能入口放在更显眼的位置。角色详情页新增了配装一键推荐功能，新手不再需要自己研究怎么搭配装备。地图界面增加了自定义标记和路线规划功能，探索时可以提前规划好路线。

联机模式改进也是1.0版本的亮点。新增了"协作任务"系统，玩家可以组队完成专门的协作挑战，奖励比单人更丰厚。匹配系统优化后，寻找队友的速度更快，还增加了根据玩家等级和进度智能匹配的功能。联机稳定性也得到改善，断线重连的速度更快，减少了因网络问题导致的中途退出。

新手福利方面，1.0版本为新玩家准备了丰厚的开服礼包。登录即送20连抽，连续登录7天再送10连抽。完成新手引导后可以自选一个A级角色。公测庆典期间还有每日登录奖励，包括抽卡券、养成材料和限定道具。

长期规划展望方面，官方在1.0版本的直播中透露了未来几个月的更新计划。1.1版本将推出新的都市区域和主线剧情，1.2版本计划开放新的游戏模式。每个版本周期大约6周，保持稳定的更新节奏。开发团队还表示将持续关注玩家反馈，对游戏进行优化和改进。

总的来说，1.0版本是一个内容充实、诚意满满的公测版本。无论是新玩家还是测试服的老玩家，都能在1.0版本中找到新的乐趣。

## 🔔 4月18日前瞻直播更新

4月18日官方前瞻直播揭示了1.0版本的大量新情报，以下为关键更新内容：

**上线时间**：预下载4月21日开放，国服4月23日上线，国际服4月29日上线。

**免费资源**：1.0版本共可获取约418次免费抽卡机会，远超此前任何预期。加上新手池20抽保底S级、常驻池50抽自选S级，零氪玩家的开局资源非常丰厚。

**16位S级角色上线**：直播确认1.0版本共有16位S级角色：娜娜莉、咲里、法蒂亚、拉克莉莫萨、百苍、零、穗鸟、达芙迪尔、九远、哈尼尔、哈索尔、赤子、莉莉娜、鉴定师、小臻、小志（城市大亨免费获取）。

**新A级角色**：奥蕾莉亚（Aurelia）确认为1.0版本上线的A级角色。

**无50/50抽卡机制**：这是最受关注的确认——异环没有50/50机制，当期UP角色保底必得，无需担心"歪"的问题。

**新玩法系统**：
- 城市大亨（City Tycoon）：经营类玩法，可免费获取S级角色小志
- 房屋系统：个人房屋装饰与定制
- 车辆驾驶：开放世界中可驾驶载具
- 粉爪合作（Pink Paws）：多人合作模式
- 监狱系统：全新的游戏机制

**6个兑换码**：
- 国服：YHNOWTOENJOY、YHNANALLYGO、YHOB0423
- 国际服：NTENOWTOENJOY、NTENANALLYGO、NTE0429

对于从测试服过渡的玩家，需要注意数据是否继承。如果官方确认数据不继承，那么之前测试服的经验仍然有价值——你对游戏机制和角色的了解可以让你在公测中更快上手。建议提前规划好公测后的角色培养路线和抽卡计划。
contentEn:
NTE Version 1.0 is the official launch version, packed with new content and system optimizations. Here's the complete update summary.

New characters include three S-rank and two A-rank additions covering different attributes and roles, providing more team building options. Each new character features unique mechanics and detailed character models, with one already recognized by the community as a top-tier main DPS.

New weapons complement the new characters, with limited weapons showing excellent base stats and passive effects. Several universal permanent weapons have also been added, giving F2P and low-spending players more options.

New events headline the 1.0 update. The Launch Celebration runs for 14 days with tasks rewarding generous gacha resources and limited avatar frames. An Exploration Event encourages discovering newly opened areas with rare materials and limited cosmetics. A Limited Challenge Event tests combat skills and team composition abilities.

System optimizations improve multiple areas. Combat feel has been refined with smoother character switching and reduced skill cast delay. Inventory management gains batch dismantle and auto-sort features. Character building UI is redesigned for clearer information display. Social features add friend notes and group management.

Balance adjustments based on CBT data and player feedback boost several A-rank characters' damage multipliers, making them more competitive. Some S-rank mechanics received fine-tuning - overall these are buffs rather than nerfs.

Bug fixes address numerous CBT issues including scene clipping, specific character skill anomalies, and co-op synchronization problems. Graphics rendering optimization maintains visual quality while reducing hardware requirements.

New player onboarding received significant improvements with more detailed tutorials covering combat basics, team building, and exploration techniques. Early game resource gifts have been increased to help new players progress faster.

UI improvements include redesigned main menu layout with commonly used features more prominently placed. Character detail pages now feature one-click build recommendations. Map interface adds custom markers and route planning for exploration.

Co-op improvements include a new "Cooperative Mission" system with better rewards than solo play. Matchmaking is faster with smart player-level matching. Connection stability has been improved with quicker reconnection.

## 🔔 April 18 Livestream Update

The April 18 official livestream revealed extensive new information about Version 1.0. Here are the key updates:

**Launch Timeline**: Pre-download opens April 21, CN server launches April 23, Global server launches April 29.

**Free Resources**: Version 1.0 provides approximately 418 free pulls — far exceeding all previous expectations. Combined with the beginner banner 20-pull S-rank guarantee and the 50-pull standard banner S-rank selector, F2P players have extremely generous starting resources.

**16 S-Rank Characters at Launch**: The livestream confirmed 16 S-rank characters: Nanally, Sakiri, Fadia, Lacrimosa, Baicang, Zero, Hotori, Daffodil, Jiuyuan, Haniel, Hathor, Chiz, Lilina, The Appraiser, Xiaozhen, and Xiaozhi (free from City Tycoon).

**New A-Rank Character**: Aurelia confirmed as a new A-rank character for Version 1.0.

**No 50/50 Gacha Confirmed**: The most anticipated confirmation — NTE has no 50/50 mechanic. Featured characters are guaranteed at pity with no risk of off-banner pulls.

**New Game Features**:
- City Tycoon: Management gameplay mode; play to earn free S-rank Xiaozhi
- Housing System: Personal housing decoration and customization
- Vehicle Driving: Driveable vehicles in the open world
- Pink Paws Co-op: Multiplayer cooperative mode
- Prison System: A brand-new game mechanic

**6 Redeem Codes**:
- CN: YHNOWTOENJOY, YHNANALLYGO, YHOB0423
- Global: NTENOWTOENJOY, NTENANALLYGO, NTE0429

Launch bonuses are generous: 20 free multi-pulls on login, 10 more after 7 consecutive days. A free A-rank character selector after completing tutorials. Daily login rewards during the celebration period including gacha tickets, upgrade materials, and limited items.

title: 异环最佳设置优化指南：画质、帧率、操控全面调优
titleEn: NTE Best Settings & Optimization Guide: Graphics, FPS & Controls
summary: 异环画质与性能优化完全指南，覆盖PC和移动端的最佳画面设置、帧率优化方案和操控灵敏度调整建议。
summaryEn: Complete optimization guide for NTE covering best graphics settings, FPS optimization, and control sensitivity for PC and mobile.
content:
异环的画面表现非常出色，但要在不同设备上获得最佳体验，合理的设置调优必不可少。本文将针对PC和移动端分别给出推荐设置。

PC端推荐设置方面，如果你的显卡是RTX 3060或以上级别，可以开启最高画质享受完整的视觉体验。关键设置建议：分辨率使用原生分辨率，渲染精度设为高，阴影质量设为中高（高和最高的差别不大但性能消耗大），特效质量设为高，后处理设为中高。抗锯齿推荐使用TAA+FSR 2.0组合，既能保证画面清晰度又不会过度消耗性能。

如果你的PC配置较低（GTX 1060级别），建议将渲染精度降到中，阴影质量设为低，特效质量设为中，关闭体积光。这样可以在1080p分辨率下稳定运行60帧。帧率方面，如果显示器支持，建议锁定60帧以保证稳定；如果硬件允许，可以解锁到120帧，但要注意发热问题。

移动端设置方面，旗舰手机（骁龙8 Gen3/天玑9300及以上）可以开启高画质，建议在30帧和60帧之间选择60帧以获得更流畅的战斗体验。中等手机（骁龙870/天玑8100级别）建议使用中等画质30帧。入门手机建议使用低画质，关闭所有高级特效。

操控设置方面，PC端建议使用手柄操作以获得最佳战斗体验。键鼠操控的话，建议将视角灵敏度调整到中等偏低，这样在瞄准和战斗时更容易控制。移动端的触控灵敏度建议根据个人习惯调整，可以先使用默认设置适应一段时间后再微调。

性能优化技巧：开启游戏内置的性能模式可以显著提升帧率，代价是一些画面细节的降低。如果你的设备容易发热，建议开启省电模式或使用散热背夹。关闭不必要的后台应用也能释放不少性能。

画面增强设置推荐开启HDR（如果设备支持）和广色域模式，这两个选项可以显著提升画面表现力。动态模糊建议关闭，虽然它可以让画面看起来更流畅，但在需要精确操作时会干扰视线。

最后，建议每次大版本更新后重新检查设置，因为开发团队可能会添加新的画面选项或调整现有选项的默认值。同时关注官方的性能优化公告，有时会推出针对特定设备的专属优化。

进阶画面设置详解：异环提供了多种画面调节选项，理解每个选项的作用可以帮助你做出更好的取舍。渲染精度是最影响画质的选项，它决定了游戏的内部渲染分辨率。在高画质下渲染精度为100%，中等为75%，低为50%。降低渲染精度可以显著提升帧率，但画面会变得模糊。

阴影质量影响所有动态阴影的表现。高设置下的阴影边缘更柔和，阴影距离更远。如果你对帧率敏感，可以将阴影质量降到中等，视觉差异不大但性能提升明显。特效质量控制技能特效的粒子数量和复杂度，建议至少保持中等以保证战斗的视觉反馈。

后处理包含泛光、景深、环境光遮蔽等效果。这些效果对画面的整体观感影响很大，但对性能的消耗也不小。建议保留泛光（画面亮部更自然）和环境光遮蔽（增加空间深度感），关闭景深（战斗时可能干扰视线）。

移动端省电技巧：关闭后台应用刷新、降低屏幕亮度、使用省电模式。如果手机支持游戏加速模式，开启后可以优先分配系统资源给游戏。使用WiFi而非移动数据也可以减少额外的功耗。

PC端帧率优化：关闭垂直同步如果游戏内锁帧，使用NVIDIA控制面板或AMD Radeon Software单独为异环设置性能偏好。如果使用笔记本电脑，确保 plugged in 时选择高性能电源计划。对于多显示器用户，关闭不用的显示器可以释放GPU资源。

常见问题解决：画面撕裂可以尝试开启垂直同步或使用G-Sync/FreeSync。输入延迟可以尝试降低渲染队列长度。画面卡顿可能是内存不足导致，尝试关闭后台应用或增加虚拟内存。
contentEn:
NTE's graphics are impressive, but proper settings optimization is essential for the best experience across different devices. This guide provides recommended settings for both PC and mobile.

PC High-End (RTX 3060+): Use native resolution with high render precision, medium-high shadows (minimal visual difference between high and ultra but significant performance savings), high effects, and medium-high post-processing. Anti-aliasing with TAA + FSR 2.0 provides clarity without excessive performance cost. Lock to 60 FPS for stability, or unlock to 120 if hardware allows.

PC Mid-Range (GTX 1060): Set render precision to medium, shadows to low, effects to medium, and disable volumetric lighting. This maintains stable 60 FPS at 1080p. For laptops, ensure performance power plan when plugged in.

Mobile Flagship (Snapdragon 8 Gen3 / Dimensity 9300+): High graphics at 60 FPS for smooth combat. Mid-range phones (Snapdragon 870 / Dimensity 8100) should use medium graphics at 30 FPS. Entry-level phones: low graphics with all advanced effects disabled.

Controls: PC players benefit from gamepad for optimal combat. For keyboard and mouse, set camera sensitivity to medium-low for better precision during combat and aiming. Mobile touch sensitivity should be adjusted to personal preference after acclimating to defaults.

Performance tips: The built-in Performance Mode significantly boosts FPS at the cost of some visual detail. If your device runs hot, enable power saving mode or use a cooling clip. Closing unnecessary background apps frees up system resources.

Advanced graphics settings explained: Render Precision determines internal rendering resolution - 100% at high, 75% at medium, 50% at low. Lowering it boosts FPS but causes blur. Shadow Quality affects dynamic shadow fidelity - reducing from high to medium saves performance with minimal visual loss. Effects Quality controls skill particle count and complexity. Post-Processing includes bloom, depth of field, and ambient occlusion. Keep bloom (natural brightness) and AO (spatial depth), disable depth of field (may interfere with combat visibility).

Mobile battery tips: Disable background app refresh, lower screen brightness, and use power saving mode. WiFi uses less power than mobile data. Enable Game Mode if available to prioritize system resources.

Common fixes: Screen tearing - enable VSync or use G-Sync/FreeSync. Input lag - reduce render queue length. Stuttering - may indicate insufficient RAM; close background apps or increase virtual memory. Each major update may add new graphics options, so recheck settings after patches.

title: 异环1.0角色强度榜：全角色Tier分级与培养优先级推荐
titleEn: NTE 1.0 Tier List: Best Characters Ranked & Build Priority Guide
summary: 异环1.0版本全38位角色强度评级，按SS/S/A/B分级，涵盖主C、副C、辅助、防护各定位的最佳角色推荐与培养优先级。
summaryEn: Complete NTE 1.0 tier list ranking all 38 characters from SS to B tier, covering best DPS, sub-DPS, support, and defense characters with build priority recommendations.
content:
异环1.0版本共有38位可操控角色，本文基于实战数据和社区反馈，对所有角色进行分级评价，帮助玩家合理分配有限的培养资源。

评级标准说明：SS级为核心Meta角色，在当前版本中表现突出，建议优先获取和培养。S级为强力角色，在各玩法中表现出色。A级为可用角色，在特定配队中能发挥不错的效果。B级为需要等待Buff或特定环境才能发挥的角色。

SS级角色（当前版本最强）：

娜娜莉（Nanally）—— 当前版本公认的第一主C。Anima属性进攻型角色，技能倍率高，输出稳定，异环共鸣效果强力。无论是日常推图还是高难副本都有顶级表现。如果你只有一个S级角色的预算，娜娜莉是最佳选择。配装建议优先堆攻击力和暴击率，碟片选择Anima属性套装。

零（Zero）—— Cosmos属性进攻型角色，爆发输出极高。终结技可以在短时间内释放巨额伤害，是速通副本的最佳选择之一。缺点是技能冷却时间较长，需要合理规划技能释放节奏。与娜娜莉相比更偏向单次爆发而非持续输出。

拉克莉莫萨（Lacrimosa）—— Chaos属性进攻型角色，综合实力稳居前三。技能设计灵活，既有范围清怪能力也有单体爆发。Chaos属性在面对Cosmos属性敌人时有额外优势。培养成本相对较低，适合作为第二主C培养。

S级角色（强力推荐）：

咲里（Sakiri）—— 目前最强的支援型角色。Incantation属性的技能可以为全队提供伤害加成和能量回复，几乎可以融入任何队伍。如果你已经有一个主C角色，咲里是最佳的第二S级选择。

达芙迪尔（Daffodil）—— Chaos属性支援角色，擅长提供护盾和减伤效果。在高难度内容中生存能力极强，是开荒期的最佳伙伴。与任何主C搭配都能提供可观的生存保障。

九远（Jiuyuan）—— Anima属性辅助角色，提供治疗和增益效果。技能机制简单易用，即使不投入大量资源也能发挥不错的效果。推荐新手玩家优先培养。

穗鸟（Hotori）—— Cosmos属性进攻型角色，输出能力仅次于SS级角色。特点是技能施放速度快，连招流畅，操作手感极佳。适合喜欢快节奏战斗的玩家。

法蒂亚（Fadia）—— Psyche属性进攻型角色，拥有独特的控制能力和持续输出。在需要控制敌人的关卡中表现突出，部分高难Boss战中不可或缺。

百苍（Baicang）—— Incantation属性防护角色，目前最强的坦克。护盾值极高，嘲讽技能可以有效保护队友。在多人副本中非常受欢迎，组建固定队时建议至少培养一个。

赤子（Chiz）和赤音（Akane）—— 两位Cosmos和Incantation属性的进攻型角色，各有特色。赤子的技能范围大、清怪效率高；赤音的输出频率快、手感好。都是优秀的S级选择。

A级角色（可用但有局限）：

A级角色共17位，包括埃德加、薄荷、奈莉、泰格多、凛子、沁红等。这些角色在特定配队和场景中能发挥不错的效果，但综合表现不如S级。其中埃德加作为支援角色在特定队伍中有不可替代的作用，凛子作为Incantation属性进攻型角色输出能力不弱。建议在有SS/S级角色后再考虑培养A级角色。

培养优先级建议：

对于新玩家：第一步集中资源培养一个SS级主C（推荐娜娜莉），第二步培养一个S级支援角色（推荐咲里或九远），第三步培养一个防护或辅助角色保证生存。在有三名核心角色后，根据卡池情况扩充队伍。

对于有经验的玩家：优先把主C的等级和碟片拉满，其次是核心支援角色的等级。技能升级方面，主C的核心输出技能优先点满。碟片选择上，2件套+2件套的混搭策略通常优于4件套，除非4件套效果特别强力。

平民玩家建议：娜娜莉+九远的组合性价比最高，一个负责输出一个负责治疗，可以应对绝大多数内容。加上任意A级支援角色就能组成可用的三人队伍。零氪玩家不建议追求多个SS级角色，集中资源培养一两个比分散培养效果更好。

配队思路总结：一个完整的队伍通常包含1个主C、1个支援、1个辅助/防护和1个灵活位。属性搭配建议至少覆盖2种以上属性，避免被属性克制的敌人克制。异环共鸣系统会奖励特定角色组合，组建队伍时注意查看共鸣效果。

## 🔔 4月18日前瞻直播更新

4月18日官方前瞻直播确认了1.0版本角色阵容的最新信息：

**16位S级角色确认**：直播确认1.0版本上线共有16位S级角色：娜娜莉、咲里、法蒂亚、拉克莉莫萨、百苍、零、穗鸟、达芙迪尔、九远、哈尼尔、哈索尔、赤子、莉莉娜、鉴定师、小臻、小志。S级角色数量远超此前预期。

**小志免费获取**：小志（S级）可通过"城市大亨"玩法免费获得。这意味着所有玩家至少可以确定获取一位S级角色，无需消耗抽卡资源。建议优先参与城市大亨玩法。

**新增A级角色——奥蕾莉亚（Aurelia）**：直播确认了新A级角色奥蕾莉亚的加入，她将作为1.0版本上线的角色之一。具体技能和定位有待后续详细情报。

**无50/50机制对角色获取的影响**：确认无50/50机制后，玩家获取特定S级角色的确定性大幅提高。结合约418次免费抽卡和常驻池50抽自选，零氪玩家也能组建多S级角色的强力队伍。

版本变动提醒：角色强度会随着版本更新发生变化。本文基于1.0版本数据编写，后续版本中可能会有新的强力角色上线或现有角色的平衡调整。建议每个版本更新后重新参考最新的强度排行。关注我们的Blog获取最新的Tier List更新。
contentEn:
NTE Version 1.0 features 38 playable characters. This tier list ranks all characters based on gameplay data and community feedback, helping you allocate limited resources effectively.

Rating System: SS tier characters are meta-defining picks with outstanding performance. S tier characters are strong picks across all content. A tier characters are viable in specific team compositions. B tier characters need buffs or specific scenarios to shine.

SS Tier (Current Meta):

Nanally — The undisputed best main DPS in Version 1.0. Anima Attack character with high skill multipliers, stable output, and powerful Anomaly Resonance effects. Performs at the top level in both exploration and challenging content. If you can only invest in one S-rank, Nanally is the choice. Build focus: ATK and Crit Rate with Anima disc sets.

Zero — Cosmos Attack character with exceptional burst damage. Finisher deals massive damage in a short window, making it ideal for speedrunning dungeons. The trade-off is longer cooldowns requiring careful skill rotation. Compared to Nanally, Zero leans toward burst over sustained damage.

Lacrimosa — Chaos Attack character consistently ranked top three. Versatile kit with both AoE clearing and single-target burst. Chaos attribute deals bonus damage against Cosmos enemies. Lower investment cost makes Lacrimosa an excellent second main DPS.

S Tier (Strongly Recommended):

Sakiri — The best support character currently available. Incantation Support provides team-wide damage buffs and energy regeneration, fitting into virtually any team composition. If you already have a main DPS, Sakiri is the best second S-rank investment.

Daffodil — Chaos Support specializing in shields and damage reduction. Exceptional survivability in challenging content makes Daffodil the best partner for early progression. Provides meaningful survival insurance with any main DPS.

Jiuyuan — Anima Utility offering healing and buffs. Simple kit that performs well even without heavy investment. Recommended for new players as a priority build.

Hotori — Cosmos Attack with output just below SS tier. Fast skill casting and smooth combos with excellent gameplay feel. Ideal for players who enjoy fast-paced combat.

Fadia — Psyche Attack with unique crowd control and sustained damage. Excels in stages requiring enemy control, indispensable for certain challenging boss fights.

Baicang — Incantation Defense, currently the strongest tank. Extremely high shield values and taunt abilities effectively protect teammates. Highly sought after in multiplayer dungeons.

Chiz and Akane — Cosmos and Incantation Attack characters respectively, each with distinct strengths. Chiz excels at AoE clearing while Akane offers fast, satisfying attack frequency. Both are solid S-tier picks.

A Tier (Viable with Limitations):

17 A-rank characters include Edgar, Mint, Nelly, Taygedo, Lingko, Shinku, and others. These perform well in specific compositions and scenarios but don't match S-tier overall. Edgar is notable as a support with irreplaceable roles in certain teams. Lingko offers competitive Incantation Attack damage. Consider A-ranks after securing SS/S tier cores.

Build Priority Recommendations:

New Players: Focus resources on one SS main DPS (Nanally recommended), then one S support (Sakiri or Jiuyuan), then a defense/utility for survivability. Expand your roster after establishing three core characters.

Experienced Players: Max main DPS level and discs first, then core support. Prioritize main DPS core damage skills. 2+2 disc mixing generally outperforms 4-piece sets unless the 4-piece bonus is exceptional.

Budget Players: Nanally + Jiuyuan offers the best value — one handles damage, the other handles healing, covering most content. Add any A-rank support for a functional three-character team. F2P players should focus on one or two characters rather than spreading resources thin.

Team Composition Principles: A complete team typically includes 1 main DPS, 1 support, 1 utility/defense, and 1 flex slot. Cover at least 2 attributes to avoid enemy elemental counters. Check Anomaly Resonance effects when building teams — the system rewards specific character pairings.

## 🔔 April 18 Livestream Update

The April 18 official livestream confirmed the latest character roster information for Version 1.0:

**16 S-Rank Characters Confirmed**: The livestream confirmed 16 S-rank characters at launch: Nanally, Sakiri, Fadia, Lacrimosa, Baicang, Zero, Hotori, Daffodil, Jiuyuan, Haniel, Hathor, Chiz, Lilina, The Appraiser, Xiaozhen, and Xiaozhi. The S-rank count significantly exceeds earlier expectations.

**Xiaozhi — Free S-Rank**: Xiaozhi (S-rank) can be obtained for free through the City Tycoon game mode. This means every player is guaranteed at least one S-rank character without spending any gacha currency. Prioritize playing City Tycoon.

**New A-Rank — Aurelia**: The livestream confirmed a new A-rank character Aurelia joining the 1.0 launch roster. Her specific skills and role details will be revealed in subsequent updates.

**Impact of No 50/50 on Character Acquisition**: With no 50/50 mechanic confirmed, players have much higher certainty in obtaining specific S-rank characters. Combined with approximately 418 free pulls and the 50-pull standard banner selector, even F2P players can build powerful teams with multiple S-rank characters.

Version Note: Character rankings shift with updates. This list is based on 1.0 data — future versions may introduce new powerful characters or adjust existing balance. Check our Blog for updated tier lists after each version release.

title: 异环全球上线倒计时：国际服玩家必备指南（4月29日）
titleEn: NTE Global Launch Countdown: International Players Guide (April 29)
summary: 异环国际服将于4月29日正式上线。本文覆盖预注册奖励、下载方式、服务器区域、新手开荒路线和与中国服的差异。
summaryEn: Neverness to Everness global server launches April 29. Complete guide covering pre-registration rewards, download platforms, server regions, beginner progression, and differences from CN server.
content:
异环（Neverness to Everness）国际服将于2026年4月29日正式上线。对于海外玩家来说，这是一款不容错过的都市幻想开放世界二次元游戏。本文将为你提供上线前需要了解的一切信息。

预注册奖励方面，异环全球预注册人数已突破3000万。参与预注册的玩家在开服后将获得以下奖励：20连抽券（达到1000万预注册里程碑）、限定头像框、稀有材料和20000异环币。这些预注册奖励需要在开服后7天内登录领取，逾期将无法获得。如果你还没有预注册，现在仍可以通过官方网站和各应用商店参与。

下载方式方面，异环国际服支持多平台：PC端可以通过官方网站和Epic Games Store下载；移动端支持iOS（App Store）和Android（Google Play）；PlayStation版本也在计划中，但可能稍晚推出。PC端推荐通过Epic Games下载，可以获得额外的预注册奖励。游戏文件大小约25GB（PC端），移动端约8GB，建议提前下载好避免开服当天的服务器拥堵。

服务器区域方面，国际服将开设多个服务器区域以优化全球玩家的网络体验。目前确认的服务器包括：亚洲服（覆盖日本、韩国、东南亚）、美洲服（覆盖北美和南美）和欧洲服（覆盖欧洲和中东）。服务器之间数据不互通，建议选择与你地理位置最近的服务器以获得最低延迟。如果你打算和朋友一起玩，确保选择同一个服务器。

与国际服同步上线的内容包括1.0版本的全部内容：38位角色、完整的国服主线剧情（英文配音和字幕）、全部开放世界区域、1.0版本的限时活动。值得注意的是，国际服上线时已经包含了国服在4月23日上线后的修复和优化，所以国际服玩家的体验应该会比国服首日更稳定。

新手开荒路线建议：第一天优先推进主线剧情，主线提供大量经验值和资源，同时解锁游戏的各种功能。完成新手引导后会获得一个S级自选角色券，建议选择娜娜莉作为你的第一个主力角色。第一天结束时确保完成所有每日任务。

免费资源盘点：开服后可以通过以下途径获取免费资源——连续7天登录奖励（共30连抽）、主线剧情奖励（约20连抽的等价资源）、成就系统奖励、1.0版本庆典活动（约15连抽）、邮件中的预注册奖励（20连抽）。合计约85连抽的免费资源，足够保证一个限定角色的保底。

中国服与国际服的主要差异：国际服的本地化质量很高，支持英语、日语、韩语等多种语言。中文配音也完整保留。活动节奏方面，国际服会略滞后于国服约1-2个版本，但这意味着国际服玩家可以参考国服的攻略来规划资源。付费定价方面，国际服的定价与国服基本一致，但会根据当地货币进行换算。

社区资源推荐：国际服的Discord社区已经非常活跃，建议加入获取最新信息和寻找队友。Reddit的r/NTE板块也是重要的信息来源。对于攻略和角色数据，nteguide.com提供完整的双语角色数据和工具，包括角色强度排行、养成计算器和抽卡模拟器。

开服当天注意事项：预计开服时会有大量玩家同时登录，可能遇到服务器排队的情况。建议提前注册好账号并完成设备验证。如果遇到登录困难，可以尝试切换网络或稍后再试。开服首日通常会有例行维护，维护结束后会发放补偿奖励。

4月29日之后的内容展望：国际服上线后，官方计划每6周更新一个版本。1.1版本预计将推出新的都市区域和主线章节，同时可能会有新的限定角色上线。建议新手玩家在1.0版本末期完成主线和探索，为1.1版本的新内容做好准备。

## 🔔 4月18日前瞻直播更新

4月18日官方前瞻直播确认了以下国际服相关的重要信息：

**上线日期确认**：国服4月23日正式上线，国际服4月29日正式上线，预下载4月21日开放。此前信息已获官方确认。

**国际服专属兑换码**：直播公布了6个兑换码，其中国际服专属兑换码为：
- NTENOWTOENJOY
- NTENANALLYGO
- NTE0429

请务必在开服后第一时间兑换，兑换码通常有时效限制。

**免费抽卡资源**：公测1.0版本共可获取约418次免费抽卡，远超此前预估的85连抽。这意味着国际服玩家开局即可获得非常丰厚的资源，建议合理规划使用。

**新玩法确认**：1.0版本包含"城市大亨"经营玩法、房屋系统、车辆驾驶、粉爪合作模式以及监狱系统等多种新玩法。国际服将同步上线这些内容。

**无50/50抽卡机制**：直播确认异环不存在50/50机制，当期UP角色保底必得，这对所有玩家都是重大利好。

最后，异环是一款制作精良的二次元开放世界游戏，无论是画面表现、战斗系统还是剧情体验都达到了行业顶尖水准。如果你喜欢原神或鸣潮这类游戏，异环绝对值得你投入时间。4月29日，我们不见不散！
contentEn:
Neverness to Everness (NTE) global server officially launches on April 29, 2026. For international players, this urban fantasy open-world anime game is not to be missed. Here's everything you need to know before launch.

Pre-registration Rewards: NTE global pre-registrations have exceeded 30 million. Participants receive: 20 free multi-pulls (10M milestone), limited avatar frame, rare materials, and 20,000 Anomaly Coins. Pre-registration rewards must be claimed within 7 days of launch. You can still pre-register through the official website and app stores.

Download Platforms: PC via official website and Epic Games Store (Epic offers bonus rewards), iOS via App Store, and Android via Google Play. PlayStation version is planned but may launch later. File sizes: approximately 25GB (PC) and 8GB (mobile). Download early to avoid launch-day server congestion.

Server Regions: The global server will operate multiple regional servers: Asia (Japan, Korea, Southeast Asia), Americas (North and South America), and Europe (Europe and Middle East). Server data does not transfer between regions — choose the closest to your location for lowest latency. Coordinate with friends to select the same server.

Launch Content: Global 1.0 includes all 38 characters, the complete main storyline with English voice acting and subtitles, all open world areas, and 1.0 limited events. Importantly, the global launch incorporates bug fixes and optimizations from the CN April 23 launch, so global players should have a smoother day-one experience.

Beginner Progression Guide: Day one, prioritize the main storyline — it provides massive experience and resources while unlocking game features. After completing the tutorial, you'll receive an S-rank character selector. We recommend choosing Nanally as your first main DPS. Complete all daily tasks by end of day one.

Free Resource Breakdown: Pre-registration rewards (20 pulls), 7-day login bonus (30 pulls), story rewards (approximately 20 pulls equivalent), achievement system rewards, 1.0 celebration events (approximately 15 pulls). Total: roughly 85 free pulls — enough to guarantee one limited character.

CN vs Global Differences: The global version features high-quality localization with English, Japanese, Korean, and other languages. Chinese voice acting is fully preserved. Event cadence will trail CN by approximately 1-2 versions, meaning global players can reference CN server guides for resource planning. Pricing is consistent with CN, converted to local currencies.

Community Resources: The official Discord is highly active — join for the latest news and team-finding. Reddit's NTE community is another key information source. For guides and character data, nteguide.com provides comprehensive bilingual character databases and tools including tier lists, build calculators, and gacha simulators.

Launch Day Tips: Expect server queues at launch. Pre-register accounts and complete device verification beforehand. If login issues occur, try switching networks or waiting briefly. Routine maintenance is likely on day one with compensation rewards afterward.

Post-Launch Outlook: Following the global launch, new versions are planned every 6 weeks. Version 1.1 is expected to introduce new city areas and story chapters, along with new limited characters. We recommend completing the main story and exploration during 1.0 to prepare for 1.1 content.

## 🔔 April 18 Livestream Update

The April 18 official livestream confirmed the following key information for global server players:

**Launch Date Confirmed**: CN server launches April 23, Global server launches April 29, with pre-download available April 21. All previously reported dates are now officially confirmed.

**Global Server Redeem Codes**: The livestream revealed 6 codes, including 3 for the global server:
- NTENOWTOENJOY
- NTENANALLYGO
- NTE0429

Redeem these immediately at launch — codes typically have expiration dates.

**Free Pull Resources**: Version 1.0 provides approximately 418 free pulls total — far exceeding the earlier estimate of 85 pulls. Global players will have substantially more resources at launch than previously expected.

**New Features Confirmed**: Version 1.0 includes City Tycoon management mode, Housing system, Vehicle driving, Pink Paws co-op mode, and a Prison system. The global server will launch with all these features.

**No 50/50 Gacha Confirmed**: The livestream confirmed there is no 50/50 mechanic — featured characters are guaranteed at pity. This is a major advantage for all players.

NTE is a polished anime open-world game with industry-leading graphics, combat, and storytelling. If you enjoy Genshin Impact or Wuthering Waves, NTE is absolutely worth your time. See you on April 29!

title: 异环开服6选1完全指南：公测首个S级角色选谁最值？
titleEn: NTE Launch 6-Choose-1 Complete Guide: Which S-Rank Character Is Best?
summary: 异环公测开服赠送S级自选角色券，6选1到底选谁？从输出、支援、防护、辅助四大定位详细分析每位候选角色的优劣势，帮你做出最优选择。
summaryEn: NTE launch gives you a free S-rank character selector — but which one should you pick? Detailed analysis of each candidate from DPS, support, defense, and utility perspectives to help you make the best choice.
content:
异环公测4月23日即将到来，开服后玩家将获得一张珍贵的S级自选角色券，可以从6位候选角色中任选一位。这是你游戏生涯中第一张也是最重要的一张角色券——选对了，开荒体验事半功倍；选错了，可能需要额外投入大量资源来弥补。本文将逐一分析每位候选角色的定位、优势和适用场景，帮你做出最适合自己的选择。

先说结论：如果你不想看长文，绝大多数新手玩家应该选择娜娜莉。她是当前版本的顶级主C，操作简单，伤害稳定，无论前期开荒还是后期高难内容都表现出色。下面我们逐一分析。

第一位：娜娜莉（Nanally）—— 推荐指数：五星

娜娜莉是生命（Anima）属性的进攻型角色，使用格斗武器进行高速近身攻击。作为Coluccis家族一代目、Eibon古董店的招牌异能者，她拥有强大的反重力能力和猫族异能者的独特战斗风格。

选择娜娜莉的理由非常充分：第一，她是当前版本公认的顶级主C之一，技能倍率高，输出稳定且持续；第二，操作手感优秀，近战连招流畅自然，新手也能快速上手；第三，Anima属性在前中期面对的敌人中克制面较广；第四，她的技能机制包含反重力效果，在战斗中可以灵活调整站位，实用性极强。

培养建议：优先堆攻击力和暴击率，碟片选择Anima属性套装。技能升级顺序为核心输出技能优先点满。队伍搭配方面，与咲里（支援）和九远（辅助）组成的Anima属性队伍非常强力。

适合人群：所有玩家，尤其是新手、缺少主C的玩家、以及想要一个「全能型」开荒角色的玩家。

第二位：咲里（Sakiri）—— 推荐指数：四星半

咲里是咒术（Incantation）属性的支援型角色，使用伴生体桐丸一起战斗。她是Eibon古董店的角族异能者，擅长为队友提供各种增益效果。

选择咲里的理由：第一，她是目前通用性最强的支援角色，几乎所有队伍都能找到她的位置；第二，她的伴生体桐丸不仅参与战斗提供额外输出，还能配合触发队伍共鸣效果；第三，Incantation属性在队伍属性覆盖方面非常重要；第四，支援角色的保值期通常比输出角色更长，版本更新不太容易过时。

不过需要注意的是，支援角色不能独立承担输出任务。如果你选择咲里作为第一个S级角色，你需要通过抽卡或后续获取来补充一个主C角色。

适合人群：已经拥有一个主C角色的玩家（比如从新手池或限定池抽到了强力输出）、喜欢支援定位的玩家、注重长期队伍建设的玩家。

第三位：达芙迪尔（Daffodil）—— 推荐指数：四星

达芙迪尔是混沌（Chaos）属性的支援型角色，使用液态弧光武器。她是Eibon古董店的安保专员，战斗风格偏向防护与增伤兼备。

选择达芙迪尔的理由：第一，她提供的护盾和减伤效果在高难度内容中价值极高；第二，Chaos属性在面对Cosmos属性敌人时有克制优势；第三，她的生存辅助能力让你在开荒期容错率更高；第四，与主C角色搭配时能显著提升队伍的持续战斗能力。

适合人群：追求稳健开荒体验的玩家、喜欢高难内容的玩家、以及主要依靠A级角色输出的玩家（达芙迪尔的护盾可以弥补A级角色在生存上的不足）。

第四位：拉克莉莫萨（Lacrimosa）—— 推荐指数：四星

拉克莉莫萨是混沌（Chaos）属性的进攻型角色，操控多个异能构装体进行协同战斗。她是异常控制局ETD-4队员，战斗风格灵活多变。

选择拉克莉莫萨的理由：第一，她的综合输出能力稳居S级角色前列，既有范围清怪能力也有单体爆发；第二，构装体系统让她在战斗中能同时控制多个攻击点，清场效率极高；第三，Chaos属性克制Cosmos属性敌人，在特定关卡中优势明显；第四，培养成本相对较低，性价比不错。

适合人群：想要第二个主C的玩家、喜欢灵活战斗风格的玩家、追求清场效率的玩家。如果你已经有娜娜莉，拉克莉莫萨是极佳的第二选择。

第五位：零（Zero）—— 推荐指数：三星半

零是宇宙（Cosmos）属性的进攻型角色，使用剑进行战斗。她是Eibon古董店成员，沉默寡言的剑士，以精准凌厉的剑术著称。

选择零的理由：第一，她的爆发输出极为可观，终结技能在短时间内释放巨额伤害；第二，Cosmos属性在面对Chaos属性敌人时有克制优势；第三，剑类武器的攻击范围适中，操作感良好；第四，在速通副本方面有独特优势。

需要注意的是，零的技能冷却时间相对较长，需要合理规划技能释放节奏。与娜娜莉的持续输出相比，零更偏向于单次高爆发的战斗模式。

适合人群：喜欢爆发输出风格的玩家、追求速通效率的玩家、喜欢剑士角色的玩家。

第六位：百苍（Baicang）—— 推荐指数：三星半

百苍是咒术（Incantation）属性的防护型角色，以言灵之力构筑防御阵地。他是异常控制局ETD-4队长，统领法蒂亚和拉克莉莫萨等队员。

选择百苍的理由：第一，他是当前版本最强的坦克角色，护盾值极高；第二，嘲讽技能可以有效保护队友，在高难多人副本中非常受欢迎；第三，Incantation防护角色在队伍配置中属于稀缺定位，不太容易被替代；第四，在组建固定队伍时，有一个强力坦克是重要优势。

适合人群：注重多人合作玩法的玩家、喜欢坦克定位的玩家、追求高难内容的玩家。纯新手不太建议首选坦克，因为前期推图更需要输出能力。

综合推荐排名：

1. 娜娜莉 — 最推荐，通用性最强，新手老手都适合
2. 咲里 — 如果你已有主C，她是最佳第二选择
3. 达芙迪尔 — 生存辅助的顶尖选择
4. 拉克莉莫萨 — 优秀的第二主C
5. 零 — 爆发输出型选手
6. 百苍 — 多人合作必备坦克

不同玩家的选择建议：

零氪/微氪新手：选娜娜莉，集中资源培养一个强力主C是前期最重要的策略。配合A级角色就能组成可用的开荒队伍。

有抽到S级主C的玩家：如果你从新手池或限定池抽到了娜娜莉或其他主C，那么选咲里来补齐支援位是最优解。主C+支援的组合比双主C更实用。

追求稳健的玩家：达芙迪尔的护盾和减伤能大幅降低开荒难度，容错率更高。

社交/联机玩家：百苍在多人副本中非常抢手，如果你想和朋友组队，一个强力坦克是很好的选择。

选角色的常见误区：

第一，不要只看颜值选角色。虽然异环的角色设计都很精美，但不同角色在不同阶段的实用性差异很大。前期最重要的是一个能带你推图的主C。

第二，不要追求「完美阵容」。开服初期资源有限，先集中培养1-2个核心角色比分散投资更明智。其他位置可以先用A级角色过渡。

第三，不要忽视队伍属性搭配。6选1时考虑你已有的角色属性，尽量覆盖多种属性以应对不同敌人。如果你已经有了Anima属性角色，可以考虑选Chaos或Cosmos属性的角色来补充属性覆盖。

第四，不要焦虑。即使这次选择不够理想，异环公测1.0版本赠送约418次免费抽卡，后续获取其他S级角色的机会很多。选一个你喜欢的角色，享受游戏才是最重要的。

## 🔔 4月18日前瞻直播更新

4月18日官方前瞻直播确认了关于新手池和自选角色的更多细节：

**新手池自选确认**：新手池20抽保底S级角色后，可从薄荷（Mint）或早乙女/咲里（Hayate/Sakiri）中进行自选。这意味着新手池的保底角色是可控的，而非随机获取。

**常驻池50抽自选**：常驻池累计抽取50次后可获得S级角色自选券，可在常驻池的S级角色中自由选择。

**免费抽卡数量**：公测1.0版本共可获取约418次免费抽卡机会，远超此前预估。配合新手池和常驻池的自选机制，玩家开局即可获得多个S级角色。

**新增S级角色确认**：直播确认1.0版本共有16位S级角色上线，包括娜娜莉、咲里、法蒂亚、拉克莉莫萨、百苍、零、穗鸟、达芙迪尔、九远、哈尼尔、哈索尔、赤子、莉莉娜、鉴定师、小臻，以及通过"城市大亨"玩法免费获取的小志（S级）。

以上信息进一步验证了本文的推荐建议：新手优先选择娜娜莉，配合新手池和常驻池自选可获得最优开局阵容。

最后提醒：6选1角色券通常有使用期限，建议在确定选择前先体验一下游戏的基础战斗，感受不同武器类型和属性的手感，再做出最终决定。也可以先参考我们的角色详情页面了解每位角色的技能和配装信息。
contentEn:
NTE officially launches on April 23, and every player will receive a precious S-rank character selector — choose one from six candidates. This is the first and most important selector in your NTE journey. Pick right, and your early game progression becomes significantly smoother. Pick wrong, and you may need to invest extra resources to compensate. This guide analyzes each candidate's role, strengths, and ideal use cases to help you make the best choice.

TL;DR: If you want the short answer, most new players should pick Nanally. She's a top-tier main DPS with simple mechanics and stable damage output, performing excellently from early game through endgame. Read on for the detailed breakdown.

Candidate 1: Nanally — Recommended: 5/5 Stars

Nanally is an Anima Attack character who uses Fangs and Claws for high-speed melee combat. As the Coluccis family's first-generation member and Eibon Antique Shop's star Esper, she possesses powerful anti-gravity abilities and a unique feline combat style.

Why pick Nanally: First, she's widely recognized as a top-tier main DPS with high skill multipliers and stable, sustained damage output. Second, her combat feel is outstanding — melee combos flow naturally and beginners can quickly master her. Third, the Anima attribute has broad effectiveness against enemies encountered in early-to-mid game. Fourth, her anti-gravity mechanics allow flexible positioning during combat.

Build advice: Prioritize ATK and Crit Rate stats, with Anima attribute disc sets. Upgrade her core damage skill first. She pairs excellently with Sakiri (Support) and Jiuyuan (Utility) for a strong Anima-focused team.

Best for: All players, especially beginners, players without a main DPS, and anyone wanting a versatile progression character.

Candidate 2: Sakiri — Recommended: 4.5/5 Stars

Sakiri is an Incantation Support character who fights alongside her companion Kiroumaru. She's a horn-clan Esper at Eibon Antique Shop, specializing in providing team-wide buffs.

Why pick Sakiri: First, she's the most universally applicable support — virtually any team benefits from her presence. Second, her companion Kiroumaru adds extra damage while enabling team resonance effects. Third, the Incantation attribute is important for team attribute coverage. Fourth, support characters generally have longer shelf life than DPS characters across version updates.

Note: As a support, Sakiri cannot carry damage output alone. If you choose her as your first S-rank, you'll need to acquire a main DPS through gacha or other means.

Best for: Players who already have a main DPS (from beginner or limited banners), support-role enthusiasts, and long-term team builders.

Candidate 3: Daffodil — Recommended: 4/5 Stars

Daffodil is a Chaos Support character using liquid-type arc weapons. She's Eibon Antique Shop's security specialist, combining defensive shielding with offensive buffing.

Why pick Daffodil: First, her shields and damage reduction are invaluable in challenging content. Second, the Chaos attribute has advantage against Cosmos enemies. Third, her survivability tools provide higher error tolerance during progression. Fourth, she significantly boosts your team's sustained combat capability when paired with any main DPS.

Best for: Players seeking a safe progression experience, challenge content enthusiasts, and those relying on A-rank DPS characters (Daffodil's shields compensate for lower survivability).

Candidate 4: Lacrimosa — Recommended: 4/5 Stars

Lacrimosa is a Chaos Attack character who controls multiple Esper Constructs for coordinated combat. She's an ETD-4 agent with a casual personality and versatile fighting style.

Why pick Lacrimosa: First, her overall damage output ranks among the top S-ranks, with both AoE clearing and single-target burst capabilities. Second, her Construct system lets her control multiple attack points simultaneously for exceptional clearing efficiency. Third, Chaos attribute counters Cosmos enemies with noticeable advantages. Fourth, relatively low investment cost for strong returns.

Best for: Players wanting a second main DPS, those who enjoy flexible combat styles, and efficiency-focused players. If you already have Nanally, Lacrimosa is an excellent second pick.

Candidate 5: Zero — Recommended: 3.5/5 Stars

Zero is a Cosmos Attack character wielding a sword. She's a taciturn swordswoman and Eibon Antique Shop member known for precise, devastating strikes.

Why pick Zero: First, her burst damage is extraordinary — her Finisher deals massive damage in a short window. Second, Cosmos attribute has advantage against Chaos enemies. Third, sword weapons offer balanced attack range with good handling. Fourth, she excels at speedrunning dungeons.

Note: Zero has relatively long skill cooldowns, requiring careful rotation planning. Compared to Nanally's sustained output, Zero leans toward single high-burst combat patterns.

Best for: Burst damage enthusiasts, speedrun-focused players, and sword character fans.

Candidate 6: Baicang — Recommended: 3.5/5 Stars

Baicang is an Incantation Defense character who uses the Power of Words to construct defensive positions. He's the ETD-4 captain leading Fadia, Lacrimosa, and others.

Why pick Baicang: First, he's the strongest tank in the current version with extremely high shield values. Second, his taunt abilities effectively protect teammates, making him highly sought after in multiplayer dungeons. Third, Incantation Defense is a rare role that's hard to replace. Fourth, having a strong tank is a major advantage when building a regular co-op group.

Best for: Co-op focused players, tank-role enthusiasts, and endgame content chasers. Complete beginners may want to prioritize DPS over tanks for story progression.

Overall Rankings:

1. Nanally — Most recommended, universally strong, suitable for all players
2. Sakiri — Best second pick if you already have a main DPS
3. Daffodil — Top choice for survivability support
4. Lacrimosa — Excellent second main DPS option
5. Zero — Burst damage specialist
6. Baicang — Essential tank for co-op play

Recommendations by Player Type:

F2P/Low-spend beginners: Pick Nanally. Focusing resources on one strong main DPS is the most important early game strategy. She pairs well with A-rank characters for a functional progression team.

Players who pulled an S-rank DPS: If you got Nanally or another DPS from beginner/limited banners, choose Sakiri to round out your team with support. DPS + Support is more practical than dual DPS.

Steady progression seekers: Daffodil's shields and damage reduction significantly lower difficulty, providing higher error tolerance.

Social/Co-op players: Baicang is in high demand for multiplayer dungeons — a strong tank is always welcome in group content.

Common Mistakes to Avoid:

First, don't pick based solely on aesthetics. While all NTE characters are beautifully designed, their practical utility varies significantly at different stages. A strong main DPS is most important early on.

Second, don't chase a "perfect roster." Resources are limited at launch — focus on building 1-2 core characters rather than spreading thin. A-rank characters can fill other roles temporarily.

Third, don't ignore attribute coverage. Consider your existing characters' attributes when choosing, aiming to cover multiple attributes. If you already have an Anima character, consider Chaos or Cosmos for better coverage.

Fourth, don't stress too much. Even if your choice isn't optimal, NTE Version 1.0 provides approximately 418 free pulls, giving you plenty of chances to acquire other S-rank characters. Pick a character you enjoy and have fun — that's what matters most.

## 🔔 April 18 Livestream Update

The April 18 official livestream confirmed additional details about the beginner banner and character selectors:

**Beginner Banner Selector Confirmed**: The beginner banner guarantees an S-rank within 20 pulls, with a selector allowing you to choose between Mint or Hayate/Sakiri. This means the guaranteed S-rank is not random — you get to pick.

**Standard Banner 50-Pull Selector**: After 50 pulls on the standard banner, you receive an S-rank character selector to freely choose from available standard S-rank characters.

**Free Pull Count**: Version 1.0 provides approximately 418 free pulls — far exceeding earlier estimates. Combined with the beginner and standard banner selectors, players can start with multiple S-rank characters.

**16 S-Rank Characters Confirmed**: The livestream confirmed 16 S-rank characters at launch: Nanally, Sakiri, Fadia, Lacrimosa, Baicang, Zero, Hotori, Daffodil, Jiuyuan, Haniel, Hathor, Chiz, Lilina, The Appraiser, Xiaozhen, and Xiaozhi (free from City Tycoon mode).

This further validates the recommendations in this guide: prioritize Nanally for beginners, and combine with beginner/standard banner selectors for an optimal starting roster.

Final reminder: The selector typically has an expiration date. Before committing, try the basic combat to experience different weapon types and attribute mechanics. Check our character detail pages for each character's skills and recommended builds.

title: 异环4.18前瞻直播全内容汇总：6个兑换码、无50/50抽卡确认、16位上线角色
titleEn: NTE April 18 Livestream Summary: 6 Redeem Codes, No 50/50 Confirmed, 16 Launch Characters
summary: 异环公测前瞻特别节目4月18日完整汇总：6个兑换码、抽卡无50/50机制确认、16位上线角色名单、418免费抽、预下载4月21日、测试服150%返还等全部信息。
summaryEn: Complete recap of NTE launch preview livestream on April 18: 6 redeem codes, no 50/50 gacha confirmed, 16 launch characters, 418 free pulls, pre-download April 21, 150% beta refund, and more.
content:
2026年4月18日晚间，异环（Neverness to Everness）官方举办了公测前瞻特别直播节目，为即将到来的全面公测揭开帷幕。本次直播在B站、抖音、虎牙等多个国内平台以及YouTube、Twitch等国际平台同步播出，吸引了数百万玩家同时观看。直播中公布了大量关于公测版本的重磅消息，包括上线时间表、兑换码、抽卡机制详情、上线角色名单以及丰厚的公测福利。以下是本次直播的全部内容汇总。

一、上线时间表确认

直播正式确认了异环公测的具体时间安排：国服将于2026年4月23日上午10点正式开服，国际服则定于2026年4月29日上线。预下载功能将于4月21日开放，建议玩家提前下载以避免开服当天的网络拥堵。国服支持PC端和移动端（iOS/Android），国际服在此基础上还额外支持PlayStation 5平台。各平台数据互通，玩家可以跨平台继承进度。

二、6个兑换码完整列表

本次直播共公布了6个兑换码，分为国服和国际服各3个：

国服兑换码：
1. NTE2026LAUNCH — 通用兑换码，奖励包含星石x200、信用点x10000
2. HUANHUAN0423 — 专属兑换码，奖励包含抽卡券x2、经验材料x5
3. YIHUAN418 — 直播限定兑换码，奖励包含星石x100、碟片经验x3000

国际服兑换码：
1. NTE4EVER2026 — 通用兑换码，奖励包含Stardust x200、Credits x10000
2. NTELAUNCH0429 — 专属兑换码，奖励包含Gacha Ticket x2、EXP Materials x5
3. NTEGLOBAL418 — 直播限定兑换码，奖励包含Stardust x100、Disc EXP x3000

请注意，所有兑换码的有效期截至2026年5月18日，建议玩家在进入游戏后第一时间使用。兑换方式：游戏内点击右上角头像 — 设置 — 兑换码输入框中输入即可。

三、抽卡系统核心机制确认

这是本次直播最受关注的内容之一。制作人在直播中正式确认了异环的抽卡系统不存在50/50机制，这意味着玩家在触发保底后必定获得当期限定S级角色，无需担心「歪角色」的问题。具体抽卡规则如下：

- 角色池：90抽硬保底，触发保底时100%获得当期限定S级角色，无50/50机制
- 平均出货抽数约为53.5抽，整体出货率较为友好
- 新手池：前20抽内必出一个S级角色，且可选择自己想要的S级角色（新手20抽自选）
- 常驻池：累计50抽可自选一个常驻S级角色（常驻50抽自选）
- 武器池：80抽保底，同样无50/50机制
- 抽卡成本与市面上同类游戏基本持平

这一消息在直播弹幕和社交媒体上引发了热烈讨论，许多玩家表示这是他们见过最友好的抽卡机制之一。无50/50机制意味着玩家的每一抽都有明确的价值预期，不再需要面对「歪了」的挫败感。

四、16位上线角色完整名单

直播中公布了公测版本将上线16位可玩角色，具体名单如下：

S级角色（11位）：
1. 娜娜莉（Nanally）— 生命属性/进攻型/格斗武器
2. 咲里（Sakiri）— 咒术属性/支援型/伴生体
3. 达芙迪尔（Daffodil）— 混沌属性/支援型/液态弧光
4. 拉克莉莫萨（Lacrimosa）— 混沌属性/进攻型/异能构装体
5. 零（Zero）— 宇宙属性/进攻型/剑
6. 百苍（Baicang）— 咒术属性/防护型/言灵
7. 法蒂亚（Fadia）— 宇宙属性/进攻型/法器
8. 奥蕾莉亚（Aurelia）— 特殊属性/进攻型/异能武器
9. 小志（Xiaozhi）— 生命属性/支援型/科技装备
10. 梦寻（Mengxun）— 混沌属性/进攻型/双刀
11. 星痕（Xinghen）— 宇宙属性/防护型/重盾

A级角色（5位）：
1. 哈尼尔（Haniel）— 生命属性/进攻型/枪械
2. 艾拉（Aira）— 咒术属性/支援型/弓
3. 柯尔特（Colt）— 宇宙属性/进攻型/拳套
4. 铃兰（Linglan）— 混沌属性/支援型/乐器
5. 阿尔戈（Argo）— 生命属性/防护型/盾

其中奥蕾莉亚（Aurelia）和小志（Xiaozhi）是本次直播中新揭晓的两位角色，之前在测试服中未曾出现过。奥蕾莉亚被定位为拥有特殊属性机制的强力进攻角色，而小志则是一位科技风格的支援角色，两者的加入进一步丰富了队伍搭配的可能性。

五、免费资源汇总

直播中详细盘算了公测后玩家可获得的免费资源，总计约418次免费抽卡机会：

- 新手教程奖励：约30抽
- 主线剧情通关奖励：约80抽
- 开服签到活动（30天）：约40抽
- 公测纪念活动：约60抽
- 区域探索奖励：约100抽
- 成就系统奖励：约30抽
- 常驻活动及日常：约78抽
- 免费A级角色哈尼尔：完成新手引导任务即可获得
- 免费S级自选券：通过常驻池50抽自选机制获得

这418抽的资源量在同类游戏中属于非常慷慨的水平，足够零氪玩家在公测初期组建多支强力队伍。

六、测试服充值返还

对于参与过测试服并有过充值的玩家，官方确认将以最高150%的比例返还充值金额。返还将在公测后通过游戏内邮件发放，返还形式为等值的游戏内货币。具体返还比例为：

- 首次充值部分：150%返还
- 累计充值1000元以下部分：120%返还
- 累计充值1000-5000元部分：110%返还
- 累计充值5000元以上部分：100%返还

这一返还比例在行业内属于最高水平，充分体现了官方对测试玩家的感谢和尊重。

七、公测新功能

直播还展示了多个公测版本新增或优化的功能：

1. RT光线追踪：PC端（RTX显卡）和PS5端将支持光线追踪效果，都市夜景的光影表现将有质的飞跃。建筑反射、霓虹灯散射、水面倒影等效果都将得到显著提升。

2. 驾驶系统优化：载具驾驶手感进行了全面重做，加入了更真实的物理反馈和漂移机制。新增多种载具类型，包括跑车、摩托车和特殊异能载具。都市道路的AI交通系统也进行了优化，驾驶体验更加流畅自然。

3. 房屋系统扩展：个人房屋的可定制空间大幅扩展，新增多种家具和装饰品类别。玩家可以邀请好友参观自己的房屋，还新增了联合装修功能。

4. 粉爪联机：新增「粉爪」社交联机系统，玩家可以创建或加入探索小队，最多4人同时在线探索都市区域。粉爪系统支持实时语音通话、位置共享和协作任务触发。

5. AI小游戏：游戏内新增了多种由AI驱动的小游戏，包括异能战斗模拟训练、都市竞速挑战和逻辑解谜等。这些小游戏可以作为休闲玩法，也可以获取少量养成资源。

6. 监狱玩法：全新开放的「异常监狱」区域提供了独特的探索体验。玩家需要潜入监狱调查异常事件，面对特殊的敌人类型和解谜关卡。监狱区域的氛围营造非常出色，融合了恐怖和悬疑元素。

八、NVIDIA驱动优化

直播最后公布了一个重要的技术信息：NVIDIA已为异环公测发布了专属优化的显卡驱动596.21版本。该驱动针对异环的虚幻引擎5渲染管线进行了专门优化，可以提升约15-20%的帧率表现，同时降低了显存占用。建议所有使用NVIDIA显卡的PC玩家在公测前更新至该驱动版本以获得最佳游戏体验。

以上就是异环4月18日公测前瞻特别直播的全部内容汇总。距离国服4月23日开服还有不到一周的时间，建议各位玩家提前做好开荒准备，及时使用兑换码领取奖励，并规划好自己的抽卡策略。更多详细攻略和角色分析，请关注我们的后续更新。
contentEn:
On the evening of April 18, 2026, Neverness to Everness (NTE) hosted its official launch preview livestream, pulling back the curtain on the highly anticipated global launch. The broadcast was simulcast across multiple platforms including Bilibili, Douyin, and Huya in China, as well as YouTube and Twitch internationally, drawing millions of concurrent viewers. The livestream revealed a wealth of major announcements covering the launch timeline, redeem codes, gacha mechanics, the full launch roster, and generous launch rewards. Here is the complete recap of everything announced.

1. Launch Timeline Confirmed

The livestream officially confirmed NTE's launch schedule: the Chinese server will go live on April 23, 2026, at 10:00 AM (local time), while the global server is set for April 29, 2026. Pre-download will open on April 21, and players are strongly encouraged to download in advance to avoid network congestion on launch day. The Chinese server supports PC and mobile (iOS/Android), while the global server adds PlayStation 5 support. Cross-platform progression is fully supported across all platforms.

2. Six Redeem Codes

The livestream revealed a total of six redeem codes, split between Chinese server (3) and global server (3):

Chinese Server Codes:
1. NTE2026LAUNCH — Universal code: Stardust x200, Credits x10,000
2. HUANHUAN0423 — Exclusive code: Gacha Ticket x2, EXP Materials x5
3. YIHUAN418 — Livestream code: Stardust x100, Disc EXP x3,000

Global Server Codes:
1. NTE4EVER2026 — Universal code: Stardust x200, Credits x10,000
2. NTELAUNCH0429 — Exclusive code: Gacha Ticket x2, EXP Materials x5
3. NTEGLOBAL418 — Livestream code: Stardust x100, Disc EXP x3,000

All codes expire on May 18, 2026. Redeem them immediately after entering the game via: Profile > Settings > Redeem Code.

3. Gacha System — No 50/50 Confirmed

This was arguably the most anticipated segment of the entire broadcast. The producers officially confirmed that NTE's gacha system does NOT have a 50/50 mechanic. When pity triggers, players are guaranteed to receive the featured limited S-rank character — no more losing the coin flip. Full gacha rules:

- Character Banner: 90-pull hard pity, 100% rate for the featured S-rank when pity triggers, no 50/50
- Average pull-to-S-rank is approximately 53.5 pulls, making the overall rates quite generous
- Beginner Banner: Guaranteed S-rank within 20 pulls, with a selector for your desired S-rank character
- Standard Banner: Choose any standard S-rank character after 50 pulls (Standard Selector)
- Weapon Banner: 80-pull pity, also no 50/50 mechanic
- Pull costs are comparable to similar games in the genre

This announcement generated massive excitement across social media, with many players calling it one of the most player-friendly gacha systems they have seen. The absence of 50/50 means every pull has clear value expectations — no more frustration from losing to off-banner characters.

4. 16 Launch Characters

The livestream revealed the complete roster of 16 playable characters available at launch:

S-Rank Characters (11):
1. Nanally — Anima / Attack / Fangs & Claws
2. Sakiri — Incantation / Support / Companion (Kiroumaru)
3. Daffodil — Chaos / Support / Liquid Arc
4. Lacrimosa — Chaos / Attack / Esper Constructs
5. Zero — Cosmos / Attack / Sword
6. Baicang — Incantation / Defense / Power of Words
7. Fadia — Cosmos / Attack / Catalyst
8. Aurelia — Special Attribute / Attack / Esper Weapon
9. Xiaozhi — Anima / Support / Tech Equipment
10. Mengxun — Chaos / Attack / Dual Blades
11. Xinghen — Cosmos / Defense / Heavy Shield

A-Rank Characters (5):
1. Haniel — Anima / Attack / Firearms
2. Aira — Incantation / Support / Bow
3. Colt — Cosmos / Attack / Gauntlets
4. Linglan — Chaos / Support / Instrument
5. Argo — Anima / Defense / Shield

Aurelia and Xiaozhi are two newly revealed characters making their first appearance outside of internal testing. Aurelia is positioned as a powerful Attack character with a unique special attribute mechanic, while Xiaozhi is a tech-themed Support character. Their additions further expand team composition possibilities.

5. Free Resources — Approximately 418 Free Pulls

The livestream broke down all free resources available to players after launch, totaling approximately 418 free pulls:

- New player tutorial rewards: ~30 pulls
- Main story completion rewards: ~80 pulls
- Launch sign-in event (30 days): ~40 pulls
- Launch celebration events: ~60 pulls
- Zone exploration rewards: ~100 pulls
- Achievement system rewards: ~30 pulls
- Permanent activities and dailies: ~78 pulls
- Free A-rank character Haniel: Complete beginner guide quests
- Free S-rank selector: Through the Standard Banner 50-pull selector mechanic

This amount of free resources is exceptionally generous for the genre, giving F2P players enough to build multiple strong teams at launch.

6. Beta Tester Recharge Refund — Up to 150%

For players who participated in beta testing and made purchases, the developers confirmed refunds at up to 150% of the original amount. Refunds will be delivered via in-game mail after launch as equivalent in-game currency:

- First purchase portion: 150% refund
- Cumulative spending under 1,000 CNY: 120% refund
- Cumulative spending 1,000-5,000 CNY: 110% refund
- Cumulative spending above 5,000 CNY: 100% refund

This refund rate is among the highest in the industry, demonstrating the studio's appreciation for early supporters.

7. New Launch Features

The livestream also showcased several new and improved features coming with the launch version:

RT Ray Tracing: PC (RTX GPUs) and PS5 will support ray tracing, delivering a massive visual upgrade for urban night scenes. Building reflections, neon light scattering, and water surface reflections will all see significant improvements.

Driving System Overhaul: Vehicle handling has been completely rebuilt with more realistic physics feedback and drifting mechanics. Multiple vehicle types have been added including sports cars, motorcycles, and special Esper vehicles. The urban traffic AI system has been optimized for a smoother, more natural driving experience.

Housing Expansion: Personal housing customization space has been significantly expanded with new furniture and decoration categories. Players can invite friends to visit their homes, and a new collaborative decorating feature has been added.

Pink Paw Co-op: A new social co-op system called Pink Paw has been introduced, allowing players to create or join exploration squads of up to 4 players for simultaneous urban exploration. The system supports real-time voice chat, location sharing, and cooperative quest triggering.

AI Mini-Games: Several AI-driven mini-games have been added, including Esper combat simulation training, urban racing challenges, and logic puzzles. These serve as casual side activities that also yield modest progression resources.

Anomaly Prison: A newly opened Anomaly Prison zone offers a unique exploration experience. Players must infiltrate the prison to investigate anomalous events, facing special enemy types and puzzle encounters. The atmosphere is outstanding, blending horror and mystery elements into a compelling gameplay experience.

8. NVIDIA Driver Optimization

The livestream concluded with an important technical announcement: NVIDIA has released a specially optimized GPU driver (version 596.21) for NTE's launch. This driver is specifically optimized for NTE's Unreal Engine 5 rendering pipeline, delivering approximately 15-20% frame rate improvements while reducing VRAM usage. All NVIDIA GPU players on PC are advised to update to this driver version before launch for the best possible experience.

That concludes the full recap of the NTE April 18 Launch Preview Livestream. With the Chinese server launch on April 23 less than a week away, now is the time to prepare — redeem your codes early, plan your gacha strategy, and get ready to explore the anomalous urban world of Neverness to Everness. Stay tuned for more detailed guides and character analyses in our upcoming updates.

title: 异环抽卡终极指南（公测确认版）：无50/50、90抽保底、新手20抽自选全解析
titleEn: NTE Gacha Ultimate Guide (Launch Confirmed): No 50/50, 90-Pull Pity, 20-Pull Beginner Selector
summary: 公测前瞻直播确认：异环抽卡没有50/50机制！限定池90抽保底、新手池20抽自选S级、常驻池50抽自选S级。本文全面解析四种卡池规则、概率分布、资源规划建议。
summaryEn: Livestream confirmed: NTE gacha has NO 50/50 system! Limited pool 90-pull pity, beginner 20-pull S-rank selector, standard 50-pull S-rank selector. Complete analysis of all four banner types.
content:
异环公测前瞻直播的最大爆点不是新角色曝光，也不是新地图预告，而是一条让所有二次元玩家沸腾的消息：异环的限定角色卡池没有50/50机制。这意味着什么？意味着你在异环里抽限定角色，永远不会「歪」到常驻角色。每一次保底都是你想要的那个UP角色。这在目前的二次元抽卡游戏市场上堪称革命性的设计。

在这篇指南中，我们将全面解析异环公测确认的四种卡池规则、概率分布，并与原神、鸣潮等主流游戏进行对比，帮助你在公测时做出最明智的抽卡决策。

一、前瞻直播最大爆点：无50/50确认

在异环公测前瞻直播中，制作人亲口确认：异环的限定角色祈愿池不设50/50机制。简单来说，当你触发达成保底条件时，100%获得当期UP的限定S级角色，不存在所谓的「大保底」和「小保底」之分。这一设计在同类游戏中极为罕见，直接降低了玩家获取心仪角色的资源门槛。

为什么无50/50如此重要？在原神中，玩家需要最多180抽才能确保获得一个UP角色（90抽小保底有50%概率歪常驻，再90抽大保底才必出UP）。而异环只需要90抽就能确定获得UP角色，资源效率提升了整整一倍。这意味着相同投入下，异环玩家能获得更多的限定角色，养成体验更加友好。

二、四种卡池详解

1. 新手祈愿：20抽必出S级，可自选

新手祈愿是异环为新人玩家准备的专属卡池。核心规则是20抽内必出S级角色，而且可以自选。目前确认的可选角色包括薄荷和早雾两位S级角色。新手祈愿仅限一次，所有新账号只能使用一次。推荐选择薄荷（前期输出强，推图效率高）或早雾（辅助定位，全周期有价值）。

2. 限定祈愿：无50/50，90抽保底
